user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamison Berg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd6I3sKfCm2ADF8pwtwM3DsigE9CIMHMXRfk-_g-4_4bW5akUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beyond expectations. Chicken was fresh and delicious. Rice bowl is a solid choice and their special was a great flavor as well. Definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUyIpi6Y1xmXbHMi3wUvCJ&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Scott L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBBjILatt8CktZFIorsQsjr_uF8dXbfvqgRo_HDwWT6sN9IaI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"BHC offers both quick to-go services like a fast food spot and table service for a more relaxed dine-in experience. We tried the drumsticks, opting for the classic and Gold King flavors. The classic drumsticks were perfectly crispy, especially with the dipping sauce, while the Gold King drumsticks were juicy, covered in a delicious blend of honey and garlic. Both options were absolutely worth it!

We also ordered the kimchi fried rice and the cheese ball. The Kimichi fried rice is good with the over-easy egg and the chopped seaweeds. While I enjoyed the cheese ball, I preferred the cheese twist as its sweetness and creaminess were more satisfying.

The signature chicken burger was a standout—featuring a large, juicy chicken breast that hit the spot.The classic sandwich was a bit of a letdown compared to the rest of the menu. The bread wasn’t as crispy as I expected, and the chicken pieces were small chunks of fried thigh meat—not as satisfying as the burger.

They play sports games on TV at night, which adds to the lively atmosphere. Overall, it's a great place for a fried chicken fix.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb8a2a7gE&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2024-8-6"},{"Name":"Lab Lab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnwu_5J3Kf2JuMsn09Anvce5N--sRCkD3IPdrn6TVwS_CPmD48DQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I waited 15 minutes for my bburing thighs but they were cooked to order and tasted fresh when i got mine so id say it’s worth the wait. Absolutely spectacular fried chicken that’s juicy especially if you order  dark meat like thighs.
If you don’t like to wait for your chicken then id suggest you go elsewhere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCh25CoN6Fqb1be-fPApVWS&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2025-6-16"},{"Name":"teadrinker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHBcMgxhzIq3yF8pzb9oNTTNU1WgyTxXl0MfU-vH-snKSN6t0Lww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Must visit when I heard a new Korean fried chicken restaurant is in town!

Bright and clear restaurant with simple decorations.

Service: excellent.  Very helpful server in explaining their fried chicken with vast choices of sauces.  One can sit down and order or go up to the counter.

Fried chicken: yummy!  The batter of my lunch leftover chicken remained crispy even after 4 hours!  Ordered hot fried drumsticks.  Meat cooked just right and juicy.  The spicy taste would slowly kick in.  Loved it!

Kimchi cheese fried rice:  tasty.

Cheese balls:  must get!

Will return!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzj_GLBQ&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2024-6-13"},{"Name":"Justin Golden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPFdfBmJNpmFJDCZY11itEElosfC0KsRuXP9WHM76VzaejKdj2IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is AMAZING! As someone that doesn't even like fried chicken and I'm not a big fan of Korean food, this chicken was AMAZING. They have this one sweet and sour like chicken and this one very powdery cheese one that were amazing and they have these different cheese and bread dishes that were great too. I tried a whole bunch of items and all of them were amazing. Staff were also very friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7ze_9hQE&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2024-8-18"},{"Name":"Lilith Of The Valley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0_4c-TGN4HxoU2N2-GgwTWn4Vo1_l8byFZPoN2u4oK9yD4oM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The server was extremely nice and helpful.  The chicken was really crunchy and big,  but also really oily,  but that's to be expected,  it is deep fried afterall. The flavor of the original chicken was really good.  We also got tteokbokki and it was soft and the flavor was sweet.  The cheese balls were a good size as well. The kimchi fried rice is also oily but I think that is expected,  it is fried. Overall I think the flavor of the food was good. I specially want to highlight our beautiful server for being such a lovely person.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnYAceKhdKiQWMmE41VBw8&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Dan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGLUUepF4JDOalbzy1N8KRMzsK1P9YsM0AGogZIo_qShc3z5tqbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Every time my wife said she wanted KFC in the past, I would only think of the American chain, but now I can only think of Korean Fried Chicken, because it's superior in every way, if done correctly.

This small restaurant is located in a small shopping center near the planet fitness gym off Mira Mesa Blvd and the 805, all the way in the corner. It's located next to the barely alive food court and there is plenty of parking.

It's pretty casual and you can order take out, but you can also dine and they will take your order and minimally wait on you.

We tried the tenders and two of the popular boneless wing flavors. The tenders were spicy, juicy, crispy and tender! The first order of boneless wings was soggy and the second order was a mix of crispy and soggy. Flavor wise, I'd say the sauces were just ok, not awe inspiring or bold in any way.

The chicken sandwiches were huge! The bread had a cheese crust and was a little crispy at the corners. The bread is way too dense though and the chicken was soggy even though we ate them immediately in the restaurant.

As far as value is concerned, this place is expensive at a little over $2 per wing. The chicken sandwich is pretty big for $10 but it could be done better.

If we're desperate for KFC after a workout at the gym, we may consider coming back, but there are better spots a few miles away on Convoy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPpo-SEg&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2024-11-23"},{"Name":"Flo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsZrNuEUj_zag6L81NJh76lgpyNff5Yiksd2XXEm4y_DoKq17Ocw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Finally some new lunch places to try at this business park mall. We always look forward to more food places close to work.

I only grabbed a quick lunch and love the Kim Chee Fried Rice with the over and easy fried egg. Delicious and flavorable.

I will definitely come back to test out that fried chicken next time.

Price Point: Normal as everyone else.
Casual Outlet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzNzuXg&fid=0x0:0x23b6e2473c4e3cb8"],"When":"2025-4-7"}]

The salad featured fresh ingredients like tender chicken, creamy avocado, crispy bacon, and tangy blue cheese crumbles. The flavors blended well together, creating a satisfying and tasty meal. The cozy ambiance of the deli added to the overall charm. It's definitely worth a visit if you're craving a delicious Cobb salad in a welcoming setting","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJtOLFugE\u0026fid=0x0:0xc5d4ad020885a17e"],"When":"2023-7-11"},{"Name":"Lala Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6RDOVjA0Bcu8PW3ub7IZVD4h4tKHi7ftSi8cUDhJRcEch5hzFeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything I've ever tried here has been fresh and delicious. I really like the Cobb Salad, the Californian Sandwich and the Napa Valley Salad. Our office has ordered lunch here several times, both pick up and delivery and it's always just as fresh as it is when I go in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEtL7NkAE\u0026fid=0x0:0xc5d4ad020885a17e"],"When":"2017-7-13"},{"Name":"Michael Pham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVckHQeOptDmAzc-Bon7WloiRME0LB69kGJipkxZVNtDWPSPM1z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always fresh quick salads, I usually get Frank's spinach...  But I have done the Tuna with spinach.  Phone in your order if you are doing take away.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4l7DaxgE\u0026fid=0x0:0xc5d4ad020885a17e"],"When":"2017-2-9"},{"Name":"Danielle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3_EXFaMivtygyRUKnsbYbhHffBAuLloSnYmUCjblQwDTWXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I’ve been coming to croutons for about 6-7 years now, and for last year or so it seems like their quality of salads have dropped. It’s just not the same.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOtK_VDQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xc5d4ad020885a17e"],"When":"2022-6-28"},{"Name":"Andrew “Drew” Overton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX45uBc8p8UGSIrpsNrtsscKTOWNMwpXxrQ_1TqrFmWXqss9naJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brilliant place the quiet little shop peaceful  and so clean. Great customer service helpful  and polite. The wild rice and chicken  soup is the best I ever had I love introducing people to this place. Only set back is limited locations o wish they had one closer to to 8 freeway  near mission valley or maybe Southpark.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Chavez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhdKdCmKo_2DmibXEHQ2LyT_uI4usI2YatGqKuPNzMjnFdQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is great tasting and fresh, their prices are same or less than fast food prices and they will always have your order on-time when you order ahead. They know I always ask for hot sauce and they went so far as to ask my name so they can always put it in my bag and i don’t have to request it. Excellent customer service!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Parking is tight, be aware.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAE5T1bFq97iAYewqi0p9_O&fid=0x0:0x7e868518f893c7ef"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Jackie Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEvzQvvw5H8BBgMhK8373zPBifbs0XocOXUomTXtG3r4ea=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Caliente is one of our favorite lunch spots! My coworker and I go there during our break, and it’s always a great time. Jorge is super sweet and makes everyone feel welcome.

The food tastes like it was made at home so good and full of flavor. You can tell they care about what they cook.

If you want tasty Mexican food and kind service, Caliente is the place to go!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuel Chavez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgzmhMRycraYvr6MoAFKROhKxfEnSXiD4fqGVSuGGMAVT_hl78tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of all the Mexican food places I visit, I think this restaurant possible has the best food at affordable prices. Yes, prices have gone up, but that's an everywhere problem.

I love the bean and cheese burrito, and nothing else I've found in San Diego County comes close","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"paterjo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLJ0wyanuvIQz5YqlbKHwwdVRyY7t1xATayh4dPtuqOJgrDi4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Caliente Mexican restaurant is a typical San Diego taco restaurant at the end of Carmel Mountain road and intersection with Sorrento Valley Road. Staff was friendly and service was very quick with reasonable prices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdk67pMg&fid=0x0:0x7e868518f893c7ef"],"When":"2024-2-18"},{"Name":"Danny Roldan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSzCp2xWBexn-41oGdDBldx1anImROCXqz146q4R642TARAY0vvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was great. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Julie Goggins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOHe2WBcGAsMaA4TRqwwzM46ss6U12sE9tjf3I7coM-y3XXS5ypg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went for a celebratory lunch with a group of 8 on a Sunday and had a fantastic time! Service was quick, seating available everywhere, football on the TVs at the bar. Love the indoor/outdoor feel. Great selection of beer. We also ordered mimosas which had unique flavors (cinnamon was way better than I anticipated). I got the hot agave pizza (only vegan thig o the menu) but it was AMAZING, I'll be coming back just for that. Overall good place for happy hour, relaxed feel with some nicer offerings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCS3pMoo7tvkWVyjDN0N7nI&fid=0x0:0x470b20f34ecbede3"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Ashley LeBourveau-Truong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0u2T4zSOaaQ77zoO-dfuL5-qqx5rC7UHPgMwupzcA0Vz1NZ_IfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went for brunch, and it was a great choice. All the food was very good, and while there was a mistake with my order the waitress was very quick to fix it and really nice about it. Would highly recommend the ricotta pistachio donut holes, and the make your own mimosa is an awesome deal - we got around 3 drinks each for four people from it (maybe 1-2 if you do a very heavy pour).

The outside space is really nice, and the whole restaurant is very spacious, so it was probably one of the only places I've been that was genuinely easy to get around in a wheelchair - no fuss, struggle, or awkwardly tight spots. The doorways are also wide and easy to pass through.

I'll definitely be going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfMlsC37IaQeCXhoJJ29V0&fid=0x0:0x470b20f34ecbede3"],"When":"2025-7-20"},{"Name":"Sarath Pullanikkatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULy8xnT-9EHJ6_PiwWvJC_WoC5jMW0zVo1SFKZHsH_Wj5xks0mQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the ambience and food at Gravity Heights! The place is quite refreshing and spacious. We tried the falafel burger, summer squash pizza (forgot the exact name, it's seasonal) and the Mac & cheese from kids menu. All dishes were delicious.
This is indeed one of the best restaurants in Mira mesa / Sorrento valley neighborhoods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgf5lTnG9wqHxbaewVtLz6&fid=0x0:0x470b20f34ecbede3"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for drinks and elevated bar food. We usually do a group meetup for happy hour here. They have specials on drinks and food.

Our server and the kitchen staff were great at getting our drinks and orders out quickly. Their prickly pear Margarita was so pretty and delicious.

We ordered tuna salad appetizer and that was pretty good though I wish it came with normal less flavorful crackers rather than buttery Ritz crackers. We ordered pita bread with the hummus and we all really liked the naan-like pitas. The chicken wings were crunchy and the pepperoni pizza was a good size.

The Carmel budino was a bit too runny and not like other thicker budinos I've had elsewhere. It was a bit disappointing. The cookie in the cast iron pan was so good! Order one if you like shift gooey chocolate chip cookies.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw94rUlwE&fid=0x0:0x470b20f34ecbede3"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmWT2bbBwdKf7jgadX4cp0ibdfN0iQDo9hZzwJmVkFoZVovQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can’t believe I haven’t been here sooner. Hidden in Sorrento Valley, this spot has such a great vibe and awesome layout. Service was excellent, the vegan options were delicious, and I loved the fun mocktail menu. Definitely a new go-to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB64KdZftQt4noTWFdl3EfE&fid=0x0:0x470b20f34ecbede3"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Heather B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVV2VcmqJMI6FWec_lmBri2DygPFvc-d4696zFJpb9vlRIkgGHX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love Gravity Heights, and tonight just hit a little different.

One of the biggest reasons I love this place is the indoor outdoor atmosphere. You can sit at the bar outside, grab a table inside the restaurant, or hang out by the fire pit. There’s a great mix of seating options with comfy chairs, booths, benches, and bar stools, so it never feels crowded or limiting. And when it gets chilly, the heaters make being outside actually comfortable, which I appreciate.

The food is classic bar food done well and the drinks are always solid. It’s an easy place to grab a glass of wine or a cocktail and just relax, especially when you’re catching up with good company.

What really stood out tonight though was the customer service. You just don’t find genuine, intentional service like this anymore, and it makes such a difference. Nate, the manager, went out of his way to introduce himself and make sure we were taken care of. Brandon, our server, was phenomenal as well. Attentive, friendly, and on top of everything without being overbearing.

I’ve been here many times, but tonight stood out because of how cared for we felt. Great atmosphere is one thing, but great service is what keeps people coming back, and this place truly gets that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cody Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUN1Rx7baNYgWzdj0DzQnXJ7SvC6ePWM3OT86qkOCLvV3CjQ4m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked into the heart of San Diego’s laid-back coastal culture, Gravity Heights delivers a brunch experience that balances craft, comfort, and creativity—and it might just be your new go-to spot.

🍩 Pistachio & Orange Donut Holes – 5/5

These aren’t your average donut holes. Each bite-sized delight arrives with a satisfyingly crisp exterior that gives way to a warm, soft, and impossibly moist interior. The pistachio sugar adds a nutty, subtly sweet crunch that plays perfectly with the velvety Grand Marnier French cream—lightly boozy, citrusy, and decadently smooth. It’s a thoughtfully balanced dish that tastes as playful as it is elegant. Hands down, some of the best donut-style treats I’ve ever had.

🍗 Fried Chicken, Biscuit & Gravy – 5/5

This dish is a comfort food symphony. The fried chicken boasts an incredibly crispy coating with a juicy, tender center—moist and flavorful, not greasy. It’s a testament to how proper frying technique and seasoning can elevate a simple dish to something exceptional. Paired with a soft buttermilk biscuit, perfectly cooked eggs, and a sage-laced sausage gravy that, surprisingly, hits just the right portion mark, this plate manages richness without overwhelming. Every bite is layered and satisfying.

🍹 Mimosa – 5/5

A solid, refreshing brunch classic. The best part? It’s made with fresh-squeezed orange juice, which gives it a clean, natural flavor that sets it apart from the syrupy versions you sometimes get elsewhere. It’s simple, fresh, and just right for a sunny San Diego morning.

🍽 Atmosphere & Service – 5/5

The vibe at Gravity Heights is unmistakably San Diego: relaxed, modern, and unpretentious. It strikes the right balance between trendy and welcoming, without feeling like it’s trying too hard for the ‘Gram. Sitting at the bar gave a front-row view of the action, where the bartenders were impressively multitasking without ever compromising on attentiveness or friendliness. Food and drinks arrived promptly, and the entire experience felt smooth and well-paced.

✅ Final Verdict

From the crisp-on-the-outside, soft-on-the-inside donut holes to the expertly fried chicken and sunny mimosa, Gravity Heights nails both flavor and vibe. This is the kind of place that leaves a lasting impression—not just for the food, but for the full package. Highly recommended, and I can’t wait to return to explore more of the menu.

[{"Name":"Diana Hay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSIhwQmyGT1NGdtXxQTZ4J08YCgRAfKx6_ewbd1Ng84TVtfANJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolute gem for afternoon tea! Portions were perfect—no one felt stuffed, but no one left hungry either. We went for a girls’ afternoon to celebrate my friend’s upcoming wedding, and the staff couldn’t have been more wonderful. They explained everything in detail, checked in just the right amount, and even surprised us with a cake and sparkler for the bride-to-be, which made the whole evening feel extra special.

The food was delicious (I’m still dreaming about that scone), and the atmosphere was cozy yet elegant. We loved it so much I came back for a dinner date with my husband, and the service and food were equally amazing. ​Experience: Great service and a killer gin cocktail list.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gary Giffin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6cPhj4NoATy-dNMcRV3pbKhjrkoliPTKBHK4vdvMugvSwlz99=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our San Diego Chrono monthly meet up here . We will def be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENfssOXY9oT2KA&fid=0x0:0xcb3605270a744971"],"When":"2025-6-16"}]

[{"Name":"Roberto S. Fierros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmHYISFUP1TQacORr2HTkBxan1DQE8H4IWlmjQt6nfHq-2Ap_D=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Genuine and caring service! The people that served us were very attentive and caring. And that’s what makes this place a must! The food was tasty and fulfilling. The curry was thick and delicious. tender meat and good rice. Rice is included in the curries which was very nice (something uncommon in other places I’ve been) the interior of the restaurant feels a bit like a warehouse and claustrophobic. I dont think the mirrors on the walls help with the decor and overall aesthetic. Lighting on each table would make a big difference.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmzHHUBeAaZqXFumscqKbQ&fid=0x0:0x4bf9f34cb3e749a7"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Food Guy Gta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbchV47NOlCQ3_TaSkBNwQM5314ieP_3Gk9JJEp73vlL835g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good was super delicious. Authentic as it gets.
Spices were the right level making my taste buds pop but not over powering. Manjot and Sabarish’s service was above and beyond to make our experience a one to remember. They didn’t rush us our give us any attitude as we did come into dine less than an hour before closing.
They were polite and hospitable even after the closing time. We highly recommend this place.
A must try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBB7i1IwJCFHOf6SZuT7l94&fid=0x0:0x4bf9f34cb3e749a7"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Justin Jose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8bE3q9oZ9csTR_9Q1SQs1pUx_YiLTdKnqO3oPG2fZX8afJES--w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing flavor. Authentic south indian flavors. Loved the Poori, Lemon rice and Chettinadu chicken. Highly recommend Salt Lassi as a drink,  refreshing taste and unique. Great environment","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sanjay Pandey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBNQF9TPTH0f7J9k1G2mPQutqOS3HNwphNxbxMEpoZNNJG-FnX8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arranged a live dosa station for a birthday party, and it exceeded our expectations. Along with samosas, chai, and sweets, it added a great deal to the event and created a wonderful experience for our guests. The food was fresh, flavorful, and loved by everyone. I would highly recommend this restaurant for catering or special occasions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shital Patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILntKHnVJ3_ddX9APIBzBjbP6WzcK2G_QL5rVKcqjKWohxyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing job! We had Madras cafe cater my dad’s 80th birthday and everyone was impressed with the food and the service. Prakash did an amazing job! Definitely will have them cater our next event.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgXtaHQMJZsSXu8iNjTOWG&fid=0x0:0x4bf9f34cb3e749a7"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Muthiah Radhakrishnan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJE0eiN6HgvsFuEWnTNNn2FqSU3GhXYVCC_qgfJ5v9RB9Ghg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don't usually provide a review but this one I had to because of how bad the customer service was. I ordered the Hyderabadi Chicken Dum Briyani lunch combo and I waited more than 45 minutes and the food did not come. When I canceled the order, they didn't even apologize. Anyways, I have been living in San Diego for a very long time and restaurants like this with very poor customer service will disappear in a year. If you read this review and want to try good Indian restaurants in Mira Mesa area, there are a lot of other choices. This restaurant simply doesn't care about the customer satisfaction.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jeff denison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILuUI3hUH6TVIwLIM0-itkr5X_V-j0-m3ibkK9UPh8KgkJHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had the Privilege of eating at Madras Cafe a few times now and The Rava Masala Dosa is the best I have had in the San Diego area. Ive also had the Idili as well and they are good too.
I will definitely eat here again if Im in the area. Thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRiJMttTUdSHMhigphpM1uWrguBXUfdzLzoFZ7Xq_m6riDKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best south Indian food I tasted in San Diego. Tried idli sambar, Idli was really fluffy and soft. Madras pakora was crispy and yummy..Sambar was amazing. Nice ambiance and friendly staff.. Weekend special was one to not miss!! Will come back soon!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDGibLF-QE&fid=0x0:0x4bf9f34cb3e749a7"],"When":"2021-12-1"}]

[{"Name":"Debisree Ray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVly3UaAqbhde1dh3oiI3HmJuPjNU47WBorjJp1HF6jBbLpWi5u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had dinner at this Hyderabadi-style Indian restaurant during a recent conference trip to San Diego. We arrived around 8 p.m. on a weeknight, and the place was still busy enough that we had to wait about 5–6 minutes for a table. It’s a very casual spot — not a fine-dining setup, just a simple, informal restaurant.

We started with water, but surprisingly they didn’t serve ice with it. For appetizers, we ordered a chicken kebab and kodi vepudu (a spicy fried chicken dish). The kodi vepudu was flavorful and nicely spiced, but the kebab was disappointing — bland, lacking seasoning, and without the smoky, chargrilled flavor you’d expect.

For the main course, I ordered Dum ka Chicken, a Hyderabadi specialty, and my friends ordered mutton ghee roast. One thing worth noting: unlike most Indian restaurants, the main dishes do not come with rice, so you have to order rice or naan separately. I got a tandoori roti, while the others ordered butter naan. The portion sizes were very large — none of us could finish our meals, and we all ended up taking leftovers home.

The food overall had a strong South Indian/Telugu-style flavor profile — bold, spicy, and rich — so if that’s what you enjoy, you’ll likely appreciate it. We were too full to try dessert, but the meal was satisfying.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1ggJXdC0kgB324zQarEqV&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFuytSQt0NimmarwxuNcJzMY7NchB7vNK2_D6mDE01mtEtUXol=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"very nice restaurant with great menu options.  i ordered the street fried rice and the fried baby corn, and both were really really good.   i also ordered 8/10 spice level and it was for sure spicy.  i love spicy food and some places 8/10 are not spicy at all.  this place has some real spicyness, but also still a good flavor.  i would recommend going less on the spice level if you like spicy food but still want to enjoy the flavor. my only complaint was that i did not find the chai to taste very good.  for some reason it tasted quite salty to me, even after adding sugar.  overall i still really recommend the food as it has great flavor, and the staff was kind and professional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKzKpJKHz0VDENE6NCX3pN&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Hary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu0Dggxo_xgx6XRarXpUxbyaqRapAdkqtr58jFF-BcOYDaj9zg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Having tried many Indian food options in Texas, this restaurant in San Diego still felt decent overall. The Baby Corn 65 is a must-try, with well-balanced spices and great flavor. The Chicken Dum Biryani was good, but the Mutton Dum Biryani was disappointing as it didn’t taste fresh and wasn’t up to the mark.
The ambiance was pleasant, though the restroom maintenance needs improvement—the flooring was slippery and the doors were quite tight. Overall, a satisfactory experience with some room for improvement.
Plan ahead for rush hours!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4lYoR_v46XjQXvSWwLt3t&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Sara Tra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXaDy-mYUxA4amVwpYGZ8vv4umJgCGhs0bUdB5GxecW28Uimso=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Charminar delivers some of the most authentic, flavorful Indian cuisine in Orange County. The spices are beautifully balanced, the dishes taste freshly prepared, and every bite feels thoughtful — rich without being overwhelming.

The biryani is aromatic and perfectly cooked, the curries are deep and comforting, and the naan comes out warm and just right. You can tell the kitchen respects tradition while maintaining consistency and quality.

Service is warm and attentive, and the atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming — ideal for both a casual dinner or bringing guests who truly appreciate good Indian food.

If you’re in Laguna Woods or nearby, Charminar is absolutely worth the visit. We’ll be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBocmOqDFCa-7csdKg7QP2I&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Le Hai Trieu Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDbU1WMOsu3xWUx6gla2HOosI6E3Wwu1gMP0SgyWIJH179qisI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered the Dum Ka Chicken and the Chicken Chettinad, with Garlic Naan and Dahi Kebab. The main entrees were excellent, and the curries were sooooo flavorful. We loved everything and will surely come back.

The service was also really nice, and the staff was really attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyUuWtdFGdYpqGF8Bqpram&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Aplih A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_G0R4WDpsPBUSLZ2seXB0kdjihBFkT8PA-Y802ceSx6fDyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Had a mixed experience at Charminar Restaurant. Drove an hour to try this as many reviews mentioned it was authentic. There was a 45min wait instead of 20min they said when we arrived.

On the positive side, the ambience was pleasant with a comfortable, casual dining setup that made the space feel welcoming. The service was average not bad, but not particularly attentive either. A bit more engagement and attention to order details would have improved the experience.

The lamb biryani was about 3/5 decent flavor but nothing standout.
The Gobi Manchurian was also around 3/5 and it came much spicier than expected even though I requested mild.
The veggie noodles were disappointing, with almost no vegetables at all.
For dessert, the Shahi Tukda was about 2.5/5, lacking richness and a bit too soggy.

Overall, the meal was okay, but there’s room for improvement in both the food consistency and service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9VbRSiCrF7lx6ijQ4ZIWM&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Markanmak M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpMiUSSBqF-i4GDzID0UK7MbgtTE2ZvBQXpHSbl9z7w2BMpiQW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delicious food and decent serving size for the cost. What’s left to be desired is the service. No one greeted us as we entered. No one checked in us after to we received our meals. Even had to ask for water refills. I can see that the taste of the food is reason for the high ratings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNtq4flmYfdWB749FJNXy6&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Puneeth Veerabhadrappa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVT8tfKwhP-KXX5H1jZdHjUqqOzVTBYHatPvqzdsry1VlXjo2YmPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re not a local and find yourself craving Indian food after a long day of exploring San Diego, Charminar is a great spot to refuel. The dishes are rich, flavorful, and satisfyingly spicy—perfect for replenishing your appetite with bold, authentic flavors. A solid choice when you’re in the mood for comforting Indian cuisine. 🌶️🍛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoeo7-yPAqT0ieC8hG82RL&fid=0x0:0xeaef69a79ba5983"],"When":"2025-12-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Naomi Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDF8ftzK9UctKJezig1ZMbn3IKqjDWM-Ocitr-eBOSdPxItRCS_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We originally ordered takeout but decided to dine in instead, and the team couldn’t have been more accommodating! The staff was incredibly friendly, attentive, and went above and beyond to make sure we had everything we needed. You can tell they take real pride in their service and creating a welcoming atmosphere.

The vibe was relaxed and serene, thanks to the beautiful Koi Pond and greenery landscaping. We left feeling completely satisfied and grateful for such a positive experience.

Huge thank you to the Sorrento Valley team for turning a simple takeout order into an unexpectedly wonderful dine-in afternoon. Highly recommend this location for both food and service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_cblG1w1a_EosvNHVl0Gy&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Pokemon Mom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNp7Ds-0AkJWGJdTphUpyvWO8PkK69oFan1HRTQkLe12biWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The outdoor seating at the restaurant overlooks a beautiful koi pond and garden.  It was nicely shaded by umbrellas.  The pastrami sandwich I had was good but a bit fatty.  The hamburger with beer for $20 was a nice deal.  Had the stout and it was very good.  The Brussel sprouts appetizer was delicious.  Nachos with tuna and avocado was also good except the chips got soggy quickly from the sauce being drenched on top. Lots of seating options available from indoor to terrace to bar.  2 hour free Parking available at the lot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmx6U8UCan5Q2xVdSu_ukW&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Chris Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0_UWMjT1cjs_IesZ4F78-fb1uFa7PQy-_FM0u9REho4ykiw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to this Brewery with lower expectations on the food. Brilliantly, I was proven wrong. The food was amazing. I had the brussel sprouts, the Beer Brat Double Smashburger, and the Food Truck Burger. Everything tasted amazing and the Ambiance and atmosphere was awesome. Ruby was very friendly and attentive. By the way that hard Cherry Cola, drinks like a soda","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCK65DHcEpUiT1XyWjhA5N4&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Gaspar “GMan”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHdUbetkDQpLQK1y3DeSfPhooXXDyJa6Oe-OkwOMg-EOH-_jBo-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic service, beer, food, and atmosphere. Enjoyed a beer flight and had the pork chops that was enough for two. Notably, bartender Riley was super cordial and inviting with everyone. Although my preference is for Belgian and smoother Hazy IPA beers, the variety is a nice mix. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDShGWEzpWBeYhlzTBEa5GA&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Kirk H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULWZ24GFMsFk6cGkNVPah8s59TewhBfHws6VeYIIS7gLIZy5FTgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went there for the 1st time with my wife last week. What a great experience from the location, parking, scenic koi pond, outide and connected inside dining and bar. Food, craft beer and HH was great. To top it off we had the lucky experience to be taken care of by Douglas who ran the bar and took amazing care of us. YES WE CAN'T WAIT TO GOOD BACK ROGHT AWAY!! THANKS :-)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEGHYPC6rgFD92nNuSKyvN&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Thomas J. Nelson, Realtor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMFO0bNMhQ6uO8o0D-V1IIIFM6l21JtPvWAaJDndvzt5N_MVfn5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve loved this Karl Strauss location for nearly 20 years, and it remains one of our go-to spots for lunch, dinner, and Happy Hour. The tables overlooking the koi pond are something special — such a peaceful setting. While we still miss the old Sunday Brunch and a few longtime menu favorites, we’ve discovered some new ones along the way: the shrimp tacos, Pub Burger, and several of the salads are all excellent. The beer selection is always on point, and the service consistently attentive. Still one of our favorites after all these years!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdITdYASozHbvnblWYHS03&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Annie Chanthavysouk (Chanthavysouk)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMye9XkBEhAhIZt_T3u7l20s5r7b5Xvp6pcMaS3fYFA-UYMYapHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place ❤️ hidden treasure.. always great food and awesome beers 🍺 never disappointed.  Bartenders are great friendly.  The koi pond is cute to look at","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6t9e9QdrtFomEcbiGZzmD&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Haven't been here in years! Met up with friends for dinner on a Saturday evening and there were lots of open tables on their patio. All the tables against the Japanese pond were reserved.

I ordered the Salmon and quinoa dish and it was pretty good. The portion was a good size. We also ordered the carne asada fries appetizer and I really liked that one too. We don't recommend the Pastrami plate though. It was fatty and falling apart. But the side salad substitution for fries was delicious.

Forgot our server's name but he was great. I couldn't decide on a couple of beers and he offered to give me samples before I ordered. He also took great care of us all evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuEeyRpCGwyY6VoJwvVPYN&fid=0x0:0xca385eb992acebdb"],"When":"2025-8-10"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"chloe li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYMjvhrBCudlB5asmjKy_T5RjPDzfPpXeExmVdrwPuMn2jEAY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and great service, they gave us free drinks when food order came late. We would have been happy to just wait but it was appreciated.

Personally I come back for the honey garlic sauce and secret sauce chicken, both me and my boyfriend agreed the boneless one has best value since we are meat lovers.

Bottom line , go for the garlic chicken","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAItR2byhlld99rNCRIuApd&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Nary Choe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJggXcH0dxaDXPdwMim4nS2Kv2u8MVyISo4Ta67IUlucDaGAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The store is clean and convenient. The Original fried chicken was a bit bland for my taste, and the cheese sticks felt like something store bought and air fried at home.

But secret sauce and original garlic wings were the highlight, and I’d definitely come back to order those again (and try more flavors).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-2Qb-X5EcV38ntQ93k_ia&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Kellie Cain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJY8TNAfCWC1_X7V5sI-Q2jkrn-KLfIcAEH-EdgPHCPwIir_I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I ordered pick up from this place today. I have wanted to try it for a few months. I ordered the Spicy Original Wings and a side of the Hot spicy Sauce. The sauce and radishes were awesome!
The wings were not. I really like the fried outside of the wings.

The wings we barely breaded(like falling apart with bare spots) and were very tough. I finished about 3 or 4 of the wings(the flats). In the picture I took, you can see all that meat that is left on the bone (very dry and rough). Plus I ordered spicy wings with a side of spicy sauce. The wings were not spicy, with the sauce they were spicy.

Now I am still hungry... :(","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOEgTqZvdUh1iG4rlfYUzT&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Nicole Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7XQDbo7geOdiJMnh2uD13jVnR2oLKI6pKruKlWAjmR9pExTLj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"honest question who puts that much freaking gochujang in their kimchi fried rice. it was practically inedible, i had to add twice the amount of rice to balance it out when i got home. otherwise a lovely place and service, no shade whatsoever to the waitstaff/cashier.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDNnQ190bxMnM0ZziHCMV1&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Ed Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLl4IVA673RCR4l4_-AJO5I6shHHVS3rej5OX5QReAkfhdNKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kimchi was awful but there are no vegetable options so I forced myself to eat it. I don’t have too much experience eating kimchi but every time I’ve had it I loved it. I’m not a picky eater I will eat anything so to say this was a hard one to swallow… I leave 5 stars bc I had the bulgogi bowl and it was delicious. A little oily for me but I think I only noticed bc I’m on a low fat diet. Normally I would have just thought it was “juicy”. The service was great very friendly and I’m grateful  to have this option bc there are not very many good options around here at 7pm. If anyone is interested in opening a healthy food option $20-$30 next to planet fitness would be so awesome. I need veggies and protein and good white rice please!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wookjin Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9_dfyKNsYEsYL8ZDOHk_d6LQaF2nCksVAkFBht5_WFY6tbOVY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":""A Sophisticated Chicken Spot That Embodies the Essence of Korean Fried Chicken"

Food: I had the boneless half fried, half sauced chicken. It cost about $30 including tax. It was incredibly savory and sweet. The batter wasn’t too thick, which was great. The portion size was generous as well.

Service: The staff were friendly and efficient. I received my order earlier than the expected pickup time.

Ambiance: The store was very clean and pleasant. Even though it’s a place where they fry chicken, it wasn’t stuffy or hot. It was cool and comfortable inside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAf2lsLW1nfJPl6jeknYTWG&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2025-7-21"},{"Name":"Ben Saph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8T1W1aQjX9GUPmYdmZQaxJgqxacJVXzJ__ej68kj6tUb4ZYxt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic food and service. The employees at the counter, Crystal and Oliver, were very friendly and helpful! Will be coming back for sure!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeNZbgHdM8tcMZIdT5uwKI&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Jamison Berg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd6I3sKfCm2ADF8pwtwM3DsigE9CIMHMXRfk-_g-4_4bW5akUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to go for lunch during the work week. Quick to order and food is delicious and filling. Ordered the spicy gilbi wings, bulgolgi bowl and kimchi fried rice bowl all were delicious. Got extra sauce which cost an extra $2 per. Would recommend to anyone, especially those who are down with great Korean music!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI_LjpXQ&fid=0x0:0xceb62c35713ab96c"],"When":"2025-4-8"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chalie Sun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJksY3cj6BoSzK-B-uolAnjXYjCwsLXbsjYozWDF7UndoWEpZr0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I come here often, and it never disappoints! The restaurant is located in an office area with plenty of parking, making it super convenient. What sets this place apart is its truly authentic Thai dishes that are hard to find elsewhere, like Khao Moo Daeng (BBQ pork with rice), Khao Kha Moo (braised pork leg with rice), Khao Man Gai (Hainanese chicken rice), and Khao Moo Krob (crispy pork with rice). If you’re looking for real Thai flavors, this place is the real deal! Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwzrPDCQ&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2025-3-25"},{"Name":"Iris C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuHx-pfjtJqbGXQX4oYk3WzvGranO8EA_hNeJnPvRsrNUmF3I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eggplant rice w chicken was so good! Hot and fresh, good balance of flavors

Perfect ripe mango, and I like the sticky rice was served warm, not too sweet like MNGO

All good things for the food and service, just wish the plate was easier to scoop from🥺Good find, def support !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIrf3Eeg&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2025-4-4"},{"Name":"L D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKvu0-jg8wIuIiBMZNcQ6w_h7J_V2oIj8DLk8HQ3z7eYZo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yum!! Portion size is a bit on the smaller side but the flavors are on point. I have been dreaming of good roti since I visited Thailand years ago, and this satisfied my craving. My friend and I sat at a table outside and the staff brought our food out to us which was greatly appreciated. We went on a weekend so I'm not sure how busy it gets during the week when people are working since it's located in a business park. Can't wait to go back and try their other dishes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb4Pqu8AE&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2024-7-22"},{"Name":"Flórez Êdgard (Eddie)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1uYU5w48PAELWt90coFAgfnFrfaPIKtvzVUDBEHf6x0Md2oLOxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Came in during lunch time, it wasn't as busy as one would expect being surrounded by offices.
Atmosphere and furniture are nice, very well kept, food was flavorful and a good price-food-quality ratio.
The only thing is the attitude of the staff, if you ask for any modifications or even cater to a special need, you'll get a rude answer and a "it's $X extra" even though it is just removing an ingredient or asking for more veggies instead of meat.
I get the meat surcharge but more onion and cilantro seriously?!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICptIH1Yg&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2023-7-29"},{"Name":"Frankie Montford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbUC7Y0oSKW7nK407tbKmy48HQUjLFH2jDHJjjaCs4ran_n6U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m from Thailand 🇹🇭 It's the warm, welcoming atmosphere created by the fantastic Thai Test Team that truly sets this place apart. Every visit feels like dining with family. Absolutely divine! If you're looking for a dining experience where the food always hits the mark and the service is second to none, Thai Test Restaurant is the place to be. The Pad pad gra prow meal is delicious and their mango sticky rice is always perfect. 🤩","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHhYeM5AE&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2024-9-6"},{"Name":"Sophia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsaRMRbGJKVfzdaUKoKjoKryoylUKoD0jFi_rneyqNkEByeDJnYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got the Singapore noodle dish with vegetables and it was so delicious! I got a level 5 spice and it was just the right amount. The portion size was a lot bigger than I had expected so it lasted me a while. I also got the fried tofu as a side and equally as delicious! Would recommend if you ever want to try a new Thai dish or stick to your comfort!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9y__X3AE&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2024-3-9"},{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Heard about this place from a friend so I went to go check it out for lunch on a weekday. It's hidden in a big business area in Sorrento Valley and there was a constant stream of customers coming in for lunch.

I thought the food was flavorful but a bit salty. The portions were quite small for the price too. I don't think any of us will be returning.

We choose bbq pork as the meat options on a few of the dishes and regretted it. They were dry and didn't add anything to the dishes. Just dry bbq pork belly pieces added to the dishes on top. Choose different meat options so that they are cooked in with the dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICtoLnWGg&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2024-1-27"},{"Name":"Rodrigo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtJOREiSzcC-Xu74fNyVu05NR1UK72v_cX7cSI4P7kAzsz1AKm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food, fresh and Thai.
This is a small spot with great food. It's a bit hiden, but definitely, you should give it a try.
Silver Noodles, Drunken Noodles, and Green Curry were fantastic. You have this sensation to want more after a bite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ9MmrWw&fid=0x0:0x1d837c43843beeb4"],"When":"2023-6-22"}]

It is a hidden gem and I highly recommend it if you’re in the area! 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDApIoWM7IR9cWy83z06c-Q&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Ed S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY73ofjG1FuNTB8iFbcGFKgGp7pWIZszH9N2CAattCAUCjtQS5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! It was so so good. All the staff were friendly and professional. A wonderful place to get dressed up and celebrate!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIwk-w8qSZxJk4CeuNe1Jj&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Martha Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-8esPcs6qngEqepRCUhuKQFso6r5Msi2CW_OOt_dDD8mwX17I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always an exceptional experience. This time we sat on the (casual side) at the bar and had dinner there. I had the Brazilian lemon drop - a must try! And an amazing Miro cab with dinner. Chef Oscar blew us away with the flavor and presentation. The lamb was delicious and tender.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDirGQL7XWOKXvcm5V7EqjF&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"rachel chrisman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRVozP0vYMBBJIYS64Yqy_HJ8a2siAXqEv_SwjPC54Nv4bcg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a wonderful time at The WineSellar & Brasserie!! 🥂✨

I started upstairs at the bar, where Lisa made me some of the best martinis I’ve ever had — crafted with fresh, vibrant ingredients. The Cucumber Martini, made with cucumber juice pressed fresh that morning, was so refreshing it felt healthy… even though I knew I was being a little bad. 😇🤣

In the background, you can actually see their vodkas infusing with real lemon and pineapple — such a gorgeous touch! The Lemon Drop tasted like the most perfectly ripe lemonade kissed with just the right amount of vodka. 🍋🍸

Afterwards, we sat down in the dining room for an amazing meal.
The Lamb Shank literally fell off the bone, served with beautifully roasted root vegetables that were cooked to perfection. The Duck Two Ways was an elegant surprise — a melt-in-your-mouth confit alongside a leaner, juicy cut of the breast. And don’t even get me started on the scallops — absolutely decadent and impressively huge this season!

From drinks to dishes to atmosphere, this place delivers on every level. Can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCY5sHh2AE&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2025-5-4"},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My parents in law came to visit from Arizona for my husband’s first birthday after being a dad. I booked this place because I know they are gonna love it. It’s casual but fine dining Frenchy style restaurant with a giant selection of wines, and of course they sell wines and offer wine tasting. The Wednesday wine tasting is only $15 per person with 4 different kinds of wines. I’m so jealous because I’m still breastfeeding I couldn’t drink yet. They chose a bottle of Chardonnay from the tasting menu and enjoyed it with the food. We did family sharing style for foods, breads with butter, bone marrow, duck salad, lamb dish and a chicken dish for entrees. All of them are very well made! The platings were beautiful and the meats cooked perfectly, tender and flavorful. For desserts, we ordered a flan, they also gave us a free churro pudding dessert for birthday celebration. Both desserts are so delicious! I think the desserts were my favorites! Especially the churro pudding, the salted caramel is super yummy. The service was amazing, we felt very welcomed. I definitely super recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJbrzJbJ6NuXIQ&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2025-5-31"},{"Name":"Krystle Cramer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNowExUQpxZoqOPcu2MQIk7Mk3hIhLN2LZLL3BxCgBGbjJs2ku9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Hidden Gem in an Office Park: A Night at The WineSeller & Brasserie

You wouldn’t expect to find a culinary treasure tucked away in an office park, but The Wine Cellar defies all expectations. Downstairs, it’s a literal wine cellar where patrons can store their own bottles. Upstairs, you step into a dining room that feels like a delightful throwback to the ‘90s—nostalgic in the best possible way.

What made our experience truly exceptional was the personalized seven-course tasting menu. Our friend had a collection of his own wines stored there and gave them to Lisa, the warm and welcoming owner. She and Chef Oscar then crafted a menu specifically to pair with those wines. The result was simply unforgettable.

Every course was amazing, but a couple stood out as pure genius. One highlight was a half lobster served two ways: one side topped with beef tartare, the other with lobster tartare. As someone who loves tasting menus, I was blown away by the creativity. Another standout was the clams with chorizo in a broth that was just out of this world. And who knew chicken could be so extraordinary? The chicken roulade was unbelievably tender and flavorful. Finally, the venison with mole sauce was cooked to absolute perfection and left us all speechless.

Chef Oscar’s talent and humility shone through each dish, and Lisa’s hospitality made the night even more special. While we didn’t try the regular menu, I have no doubt it’s just as delightful. If you’re looking for a unique dining experience with a personal touch, The WineSeller is a must-visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Larry Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaBr_5Jmtv-CCUiLC0wPDVQ3xDNuXjSAzOk7kfGBPj5q31dG1R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chef's mercy menu was extremely well paired with the wines and offered a unique dining experience with plenty of pleasant culinary surprises.  The staff and service are second to none in the San Diego area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rafael Gonzalez-Arnau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYeW7rAttHEmwP8Zzuc8OoWSWBIb47-R4pkA9RfNj0CtJFpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent service. Extensive wine list, yet you can purchase a bottle at their store at retail price and drink it. Saving some money. Their corkage fee is also very reasonable. The cheese plate selection is not fantastic. The duck and lamb are very good. Incredibly,  the potatoes and veggies were a miss. Very limited selection of digestives and dessert.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB28_03AE&fid=0x0:0x55c9a41e827fe866"],"When":"2023-1-29"}]

[{"Name":"christina howard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLC7y3JfeKcvKMKzLQyja2JLS_q66eJBPAMtMXWWnhdPgytKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I LOVE THIS PLACE, I cannot begin to count how many times I have eaten here.  Not only is the food amazing but the staff is amazing, there is one particularly sweet lady that always remember my face and my dietary preference.

For lunch, they have a great lunch deal, it’s very affordable and you get quite a large portion of food. It is so generous that I usually eat it for two to three meals. When you go in they have about 6-8 premade curries that you can choose from for the lunch deal and they usually have at least 3 vegetarian options. Every single curry I have tried from this place has been wonderful. Plus the naan that is freshly made to order, and they are scrumptious. And every lunch deal comes with a little rice pudding dessert, and it is the best rice pudding I have had. Lastly their samosa is perfectly flavored and has the right amount of spice and heat!

Highly recommend this place! I have never had a bad experience or meal here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSZ9bN6ft73QYQ8gqfHbPl&fid=0x0:0xb982096ea5e99ebf"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic Indian food. [{"Name":"sonam p","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsGhjypjofvEds7npyqWlbp9riUAH3v7d7UIm0-wpOWd4UuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a truly touching experience at Urbane Cafe today. When placing my order, I mentioned that the last time I had this sandwich, it wasn’t made properly, and I politely requested that it be prepared well this time.

I was genuinely taken by surprise by the response from Bryan C., who was taking my order. Without hesitation, he told me he wouldn’t charge me for the sandwich—even though I repeatedly insisted that I should pay. His integrity, kindness, and customer-first attitude truly touched my heart.

What made the experience even more special was that Bryan personally came outside to hand over my order. He was incredibly polite, warm, and sincere, and he made sure the sandwich was prepared perfectly this time.

It’s rare to witness such genuine care and willingness to make things right. This experience left a lasting impression on me, and I’m truly grateful. Thank you, Bryan for reminding me what exceptional customer service really looks like.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paola Marquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXIbKUeBFZK639HSO3O8sSGsYsW3iOyBfqSQrKsLHEcYBzMA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best variety incredibly tasting healthy food in the area!! They are always polite, friendly, and fast. Leadership here is also approachable and helpful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sunil Kurian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX93XUTdVoApEu4PErEJIVr7gPXgQM5ya4clbIoCOaLOzzzxbbj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had lunch here a couple of weeks ago at the Mira Mesa location. The food was good overall. We tried the turkey club sandwich and the ahi bowl. The sandwich was tasty—especially the focaccia bread, which was a standout. The ahi bowl was a bit of a hit or miss—the dressing was overly sweet and the portion size felt a bit small. Still, it’s a decent spot to check out if you’re in the Mira Mesa area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFLzwtSiCvM3DKSgli3QY6&fid=0x0:0xa96aa933624fc5a6"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"An Pham Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFfW7-yqF9mDtJbNXssZT_A_Q-FvyYkHMMb68rMe29VE-vTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time eating here and we will definitely be back! Everything we had was fresh and delicious! Totally recommend the turkey cranberry Brie sandwich, Baja enchilada soup, and Baja bowl. The freshly baked Focaccia bread and cookies are so good! The service was great especially with Brian who was extra friendly, took our order, made great recommendations, and even checked on how we were enjoying our meal. 5 stars!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Will definitely visit again! ( the door might seem closed, they have a shade or something, but they are open! )","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsAL0ROWgRT7yaIZmhZPHM\u0026fid=0x0:0x53c3e5361cd90152"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Aden Wexberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqMqVuuQ0k7Ek-mzjvLGeE4oq398kuY3QYJ1zDsY2xfuT_1g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped in for a quiet dinner and had the best time. I’ll be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCG78pnmFL4vMC2nuNPbdd4\u0026fid=0x0:0x53c3e5361cd90152"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Ron Miz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU89timr0ucG6o6A8RDg-pS7JLb4eE-Nzn5dLa8pVyE8EdLqVAvgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down, this is a hidden gem! Check out the reviews, everyone is very happy with their experience and food. I now know why after paying them a visit. I will definitely go back every time I'm in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEK-brtajrab09wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x53c3e5361cd90152"],"When":"2025-5-30"},{"Name":"Leslie Amen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWfS2vj3ZXYd2m5WUzbwdlwoz5ir89UcUGK8VzNlYVIT6fG1sjuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Called for pick up. Food was ready when I arrived. The owner was very kind. I was very happy with the quality and the generous portions. I especially loved the masago on the California rolls. The additional goodies he included were a very nice touch.\nI will definitely be back again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelsea Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKtWgViJ7rJHY4d2gT3p2o_P67RWk2fNGoHgSpQ86h8yvydjrF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The restaurant looked closed, but I’m glad we went in anyway. The owner was such a kind man and dinner was great! The portions were huge and the extras like the edamame, crab salad, seaweed salad were so thoughtful. We got the shrimp tempura roll (favorite) and spicy scallop roll (the best I’ve had in YEARS) as well as spicy tuna and California. All were huge and delicious! We planned on ordering six rolls, but the owner said four would fill us up (party of 3) and he was right! We are stuffed! He gave us some candy to end the meal and sent my daughter home with fresh flowers. Will definitely come again next time we are in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICd0N6u1QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x53c3e5361cd90152"],"When":"2024-2-10"},{"Name":"Mark Foreman, Psy.D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5n2rg5rEj8enh_9RSPSnxr3Lg59Q09RdKAvkt7rTswlpobq3G=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owner was very friendly at gracious. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joshua Johansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsbGf7aI6nUbfVHwSUu_mBxSLz1R2gx5KiMqt2vuqtuGINSACo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ike's was just a random find on UberEats, looking for something new and nice while staying here in San Diego; oh boy... they didn't disappoint!

I ordered the Menage A Trois and the Matt Cain sandwichs, and they were both quite nice. They both were ordered with Dutch crunch bread, lettuce, red onion, and tomato.

Both sandwiches meat's were tender and well flavoured, they arrived hot and well wrapped. Truly nothing to complain about, they were both fantastic tasting and the texture beats a lot of other sandwich shops out there.

Be warned, they are quite filling and dense sandwichs, just one was enough to satisfy.

Our server Tessa prepared the rolls wonderfully and the packer Leila ensured they arrived safe and sound.

Would definitely recommend and will eat here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpAvdDM94rhvgWl9n_Zh_C&fid=0x0:0x22758366756b4ed8"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Bryan Joseph O'Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5e8fVIbIL5GZbmxP4eEjXUz0xPkJk1dONQz3ATeodrMmt9aLPyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"2 female employees. Dutch crunch bread was not heated. Barely any items in the sandwich itself. We usually go here and the sandwhiches are usually pretty good. Do better!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwWbquJWBRCyC1hTCsDfu4&fid=0x0:0x22758366756b4ed8"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Kathleen Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1nl5Lprzp6fUbgD9Iu7u5fXyxBlzep0HhSTpBdA_mww6JnC-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Sandwiches are pretty tasty and full. I woulnd't say it is the healthiest lunch option. The Dutch crunch bread is great. The person making the sandwiches put it together nicely. However, they're like $14-16 a sandwich, and at lunch time, it can take a long time. The service is friendly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darian Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaO-OfhucbIu4TsMP2yOkjdhLN4XhXlqyc1gzlBw5lMmSCahIG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re anywhere near Scranton Rd and craving a sandwich that doesn’t taste like someone gave up halfway through making it, Ike’s is the spot. The bread alone could win awards—it’s perfectly toasted, soft inside, with just enough crunch on the outside to make you feel like you’re eating something special. The flavor combos are creative without being pretentious, and everything actually tastes fresh (a rarity in the world of chain sandwiches).

The staff at this location deserves a shoutout too. They’re friendly without the fake “corporate script” energy, quick with service, and they don’t skimp on portions. You leave with a sandwich that’s stacked, not sad.

Bonus points: the sauce game here is strong. Ike’s dirty sauce should probably be bottled and sold as a life essential.

Bottom line—this isn’t just another sandwich shop. It’s the kind of place that makes you rethink what a sandwich can be. Five stars all day!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stormy Blu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyyk11oOQa92dj9BmVcgt4r_NvjRB5scn0dkJfN2UrQNgR4Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"DELICIOUS!!! BEST SANDWICH I'VE HAD IN A LONG TIME! AMAZING CUSTOMER SERVICE 1/30/26 @ 2PM The gentlemen  That helped me and recommended what I should get and what kind of bread was on point and had an amazing customer service to facility is very clean well kept I will be back I do recommend getting the Italian sub","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jack - ULTRAFINEEATS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZyOEayQqXTvDiL0psnOMsUlYLSdhXFaWZXxa6XBOr8gYm-iY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had a pretty good Philly style sandwich called the "The Hollywould's SF Cheese steak" on their S.F. sourdough roll for $14.50.

My first impression was that I really liked the sourdough roll with this sandwich. It had a great flavor and texture. They placed a good amount of beef and mushrooms in the sandwich. The both the meat and mushrooms tasted good, but the meat was a tad dry. I added lettuce and tomatoes to the sandwich, which were fresh. I really liked the sourdough roll.

The service was good. Both employees had a decent sense of humor and were quite efficient in what they do. The sandwich shop was clean and well organized.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jim @","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiP1ZK8YZ7k0Ae7beIs_bS1gBXOZp_qyTVTt2k_vGAVTPeWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I gave this place a 3 mainly based on the service. It is a walk up counter with some tables to atmosphere does not apply.

Good service but place was empty on a Saturday, friendly service, overpriced for what you get. I have heard many people rave about it but it did not deliver.

Got 2 sandwiches for $36 bucks both were to big to eat because of the large bread which was rather tasteless one sandwich was veg one meat. Both were pretty weak with not much flavor, just not much going on.

Compared to Jersey Mikes this place is overpriced and under flavored. Try the Mc D's across the parking lot.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allan L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSWhyTHxU_wbeH1agCBWBVi4NhfLIYAUnwDiZ6b4CMPo8P1SQU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The sometimes I’m a vegetarian sandwich is so good. Meatless Mike. I’m vegetarian so had those so far.

Staff is friendly, food out right on time, fresh food, clean restaurant, can’t ask for more.

Thanks team! Will be back!","Images":null,"When":""}]
