[{"Name":"Aplih A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_G0R4WDpsPBUSLZ2seXB0kdjihBFkT8PA-Y802ceSx6fDyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This place has a good concept and some good flavors, but the experience was a bit hit or miss. Service was far from friendly.

Tried a chat item and it was too oily, wasn’t served with any chutney; when asked we were directed to a buffet station that only had chutney and sambar cold that actually go with South Indian dishes but not chat items. Had to ask again at the counter for mint and red chutneys that go with chat.

It’s a decent spot if you’re craving dosa, but there’s room for improvement to make the experience better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0CcWZ_Ouy9nEe0ZA-IaaO&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Shivshil Shukla (Shiv)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRQXbP9Fn6jqx25dIsYadZGjcqyLW3NBbDyrrTW-jOBnyFw6pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful food and service. The staff is very friendly and knowledgeable. I got the Mysore dosa with the perfect about of flavor. My husband got the paneer dosa which was just as delicious. It’s our go-to favorite South Indian restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrD86cbnbmOlK46mQ4Apfy&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Check","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUuec55_8-1gZTx8pEfjUXBwV9RYsJnOf5LoHaouDcKdwj3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They serve the dosa without any chutney or sambar; instead, the sambar is kept in a buffet-style container, and it’s very cold. The staff isn’t welcoming, and the food quality is disappointing. We ordered three different types of dosa and an idli, and none of them tasted good. We took a few bites and left. If you want to waste your money, this is the place to go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPubSkgqCjABUTsYv4-jwR&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Dan's Inferno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFp4OhYFAH-_M0Ph-Oo2hw1fb4v-m87yo2S7dFB6fDLEeLtEVoOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The South Indian cuisine at this casual place specializes in various dosas, idli, and more. Going on Christmas night was kind of a mad house but this is clearly a popular place that aligns with the taste of the food. The masala dosas were crispy, and the coconut chutney, rasam, and sambar were fantastic, as was the sambar idli and dahi vada. Gulab jammun capped the dinner with four pieces (rare for an Indian restaurant in the U.S.) for dessert.  This gora pakora had a happy tummy tonight. *** Update July 2025: It's still really good. Rasam was amazing. No problem getting a table this time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf5MG7Eg&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2024-12-26"},{"Name":"JBUG Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXS4BaqKPYHhtjIJxPwtOkcfaHIDpnpVN9oR2KFJvkTKqdQUWHY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great dosa restaurant. The dosas were huge. The little side dishes and dips were ok. The price is reasonable and atmosphere is great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCd0fI2KYWM_HBlvZKTd8C6&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Kartal Ay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwq3RTHSVKq955irLoLNIHPPWikqVWqme88Hv0zqsLFQQTe9o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Rating: 1 star (if minus stars were possible, I’d give that)

I came to Dosa Studio after a long time to have some Indian food, and honestly, the experience was a complete disaster.

First, the food quality was unacceptable. I’d Vada, and it was clearly fried in old, reused oil. The smell was horrible, and it was impossible to eat. The Puri was the same—oily, stale, and unpleasant. This kind of food is not just bad tasting, it’s genuinely unhealthy. I don’t understand how people are eating this regularly.

Second, the lack of manpower is shocking. There was basically one person running everywhere—taking orders, serving food, and managing the dosa counter. Because of this, the wait time was extremely long, and the whole place felt chaotic.

There was a huge line, no proper management, and no concern for customer experience. With conditions like this, I seriously don’t understand how this place has high ratings.

This was one of the worst dining experiences I’ve had. I would not recommend this place to anyone, and I definitely won’t be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIaMScjxStIIlQ0N8DGRtp&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Swetha Uppula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOhtCUguLrcDc8xUZMgLUXebCyGLQlrmn5rOo0e94MCGJxNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We tried the weekend brunch buffet at Dosa Studio and were quite disappointed. While the vada was crispy and the sambar was hot and flavorful, and the samosa chaat made at the counter was a nice touch, the rest of the experience fell short. The chutneys lacked any tempering or flavor, making them quite bland by Indian standards.

The dosa service was extremely slow, and when it finally arrived, the dosa was very small with barely any aloo masala inside. The pooris looked overly oily, and although there were several curries that would pair well with rice, there was no white rice at all, which is very unusual for an Indian buffet.

We went with a lot of excitement and hunger, hoping to enjoy a hearty and authentic Indian buffet, but unfortunately, it didn’t live up to the expectations and wasn’t worth the price. Definitely not the experience we were hoping for.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKHAgOi86fG0ogE&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Hassaan Faridi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMh6Es6-cANEVjsC2v8Qc83i5Q21oKDMbnbZq5DXNTyowM4qYk8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good place for dosa. A bunch of types of dosa available to choose from. They also have specials each day, like chaat buffet, pani puri etc. the service was ok. The food came quickly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQXQTCbe3SwkOD_x8yukc8&fid=0x0:0x63c3538440c36cf3"],"When":"2025-7-26"}]

[{"Name":"Stephen Essary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDDtqc-Z948uB00TQ63P5RSoVeNYHwf2EUylwTaDDTplFkbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The flavors of all the food mix so well with our drinks. The atmosphere was modern and up to date with just the right amount of lighting. We will be returning soon to try more original drinks and food from Park Commons. This place is cozy and the service is fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcorSFjQE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2019-12-21"},{"Name":"Jeff Narucki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNXlk_Y8m911lR-RKsktXy83zmKKWI7Elmwy-DDrpIusNg7w0n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice hidden gem in the middle ofan office park with several restaurants and a bar.

Lots of seating and fast casual food service.

There's lots of construction going on here so stay alert for available parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMnduYnL8cvhzQE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2025-5-29"},{"Name":"RED WIRE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzgTy1T56gyeZtByk5ytSpejfIDZuzJOw9hZoPe0MSFyZ5FkAt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here, got the double burger with bacon, o mannnnn wth i am happy now… i always craving for new taste and menus. One thing, they know that you should not put pickles in the cheeseburger, thats a points. As I really hate pickles in the burgers and if i forgot to say it, i say shit… nice place, nice ambient, nice interiors, open areas is cool. Will check there latte","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6paGF0AE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2021-10-5"},{"Name":"Robert Rael","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWczQD9vieLUF8yWcPQb9fn0k3wbZY-0-H0_ygNAyWgJ9-rjepHLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Update 2024-06-18: Ordered a Tropical Salmon Bowl, and wholly cow, instead of raising prices more, they have really lowered the portion sizes.  My meal is now an appetizer.  In my photos below, first 2 photos are before times, and last photo is today's bowl.  Bad angle, but should give you an idea of what they have done to portions.

Update: 2022-08-23: Enjoyed a Tuna Poke bowl and the fish was not too fishy.  They've redeemed themselves the last 5 visits.  I usually get the hamburger to be on the safe side.

The fish in this bowl was pretty fishy, usually but a good indication, but I powered through it and enjoyed it enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOmIPsJA&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2022-5-31"},{"Name":"teadrinker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHBcMgxhzIq3yF8pzb9oNTTNU1WgyTxXl0MfU-vH-snKSN6t0Lww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Things to improve for grand opening:
1. Ice machine - it was not working properly during peak lunch hours on Friday.
2. The ordering kiosk screen should be redesigned for easy reading.   Too overwhelmed with so many pictures and words on a small screen.
3. crowd control - ordering area was small.  Friday had a huge crowd.   Ordering lines were crashing into each other and people who were waiting for their food.
4.  a person for order check - I ordered the burger sauce on the side but it wasn’t in my to-go bag.   The server pick up the fries from another to-go bag and put in mine,  yuck!!! It was 1/2 bag full anyways.

It was 1/2 price during soft opening.   Not sure we will back for grand opening for self service $15 lunch - pricy!!!  For the price, maybe I go to a sit down restaurant instead a self service food hall.

It was 2 stars because I realized this is owned by the same group also owns Gravity Height.   I don’t have to wait for Sunday afternoon to get the same fried chicken!

Although this was still soft opening, given overall experience, don’t think we will come often.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMiqGQ4QE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2019-11-10"},{"Name":"Sina Shahhosseini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAvsTEe9JL7rJ6Prl8MqHIaqowfYxMznOVSeqWPkMbI73ymE4O=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Park Commons is convenient due to its location near my work, but the experience is inconsistent. The meat often feels mediocre, and while some dishes are decent, the quality overall needs improvement.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_oezc3AE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2025-1-16"},{"Name":"v patel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH2wYe2ZZ39UUrhb8zvLlVTQEAa5kW_pa9JQWiNtRqwjyxCV1j=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went there over a weekend for a private party.

The staff is very good, courteous and friendly. The bartender suggested a mocktails and it was truly amazing.

Will not comment on the food, as I only tried their Mediterranean platter and cheese pasta and that does not represent the whole menu. Both were pretty amazing though.

A really nice place with a good ambience and vibe for birthday parties.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZlOqjYA&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2023-9-4"},{"Name":"Michelle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX83q3Jatb-qXVrkMFfOn6bbh9fvgDSar0yJfrbauObAHBqK5u1pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful and amazing super friendly service. Stunning landscape! I didn’t have any food while I was here but every thing looked amazing and all the staff had huge smiles on their faces as every single one greeted me while I was walking around. Greet place to get some laptop work done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2p7ezjAE&fid=0x0:0x6ebd8a2d776e275a"],"When":"2022-4-29"}]

[{"Name":"Anya Marjanian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiBYea7fH4SbYXG2Ln0n0A1lZBFIw4zQRdFJ_ZwTEDxvwLYgW1pQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Nassim Mediterranean Restaurant

I had such an amazing experience at Nassim Mediterranean Restaurant! The food is incredibly flavorful and fresh — you can really taste the quality in every bite. The portions are generous, and the menu has a great variety, so there’s something for everyone. The staff are warm, welcoming, and attentive, which makes the whole dining experience even more enjoyable. The atmosphere is clean, comfortable, and perfect for a casual meal or a night out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crystal Kamada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvOxOWwnV-_kuEe0x5aacDEyzRdZEIzpeGachS-H_Vy0uAzcg57Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naseem's is located in Sorrento Valley across from Qualcomm in a little center with a few restaurants on Pacific Heights Blvd.  We first discovered her food when I was pregnant with our son nearly 6 years ago and our doctor's office was located nearby.  Soon, it became a RAGING MANDATORY REQUIREMENT that I get her delicious lamb koobideh (ground meat kebab) every time we went to the doctor.  Or sometimes Stephen would be forced to make the drive from Escondido even without any appointments because.... you know...cravings 😂
When our son was born I would joke that he's my little koobideh and pretend to eat his cheeks ❤

Naseem and her little cafe will always be so special to our little family.   She is such a warm, kind person and you can see how hard she is working and you can just taste and feel the love she puts in to her food.  Simple menu of kebab served with rice plates or in a wrap, and it's some of the best around town (don't need no fancy downtown $40 kebab when this is perfection!!)  She serves tea and coffee, and if you're lucky to get your hands on them before they sell out, she makes amazing fresh baked cream puffs too!  We'll have to show you guys next time if we can get there early enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWuM7WOA&fid=0x0:0x55402142cb567666"],"When":"2022-3-15"},{"Name":"Mohammad H. Naderi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZxg3sg2sPJU-AlckT1Figj1zJw-IeREBKYjfYeRaxdm5CQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant is managed by the Nowroozi family. They are quite nice and friendly. The food quality is the best from natural and fresh ingredients. They offer varieties of Kabob and Stews. You can pick kabobs in different format like in wrap, with rice and salad, or with spring salad.
The taste of the food are amazing and it has already the required sides. Thus, you don't need to pay extra for the sides. It is the best place to have a quick but healthy and delicious food during your working days. I usually call Naseem for pre-ordering whenever I start walking to that restaurant. When I arrived there, my yummy meal is ready on the table! As a result, I can come back to my work very quickly with lots of energy.
Friday is the day for treating myself with Naseem's baking and pastries. Their Persian style hot tea along with Naseem's Cream Puff is the best combination for refreshing yourselves during afternoon.
Thank you Nowroozi family for establishing such a successful restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4_YyS6gE&fid=0x0:0x55402142cb567666"],"When":"2018-10-27"},{"Name":"Michael Fortenberry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe_k6KCymAJujCBgScNLewl9K-REElZkMjl4u3RvfwjRKO9rCL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic lamb kabob plate!  Small restaurant, super helpful staff and we definitely liked the outside seating. They have an extensive menu that’s worth asking about if you stop in. This restaurant is close to a lot of nice places to stop in and check out.  Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEjMSfXA&fid=0x0:0x55402142cb567666"],"When":"2019-4-25"},{"Name":"Neda Dalili","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaCyLWBxY8HYW0l4BprfNntI785pLOGEYgylyEFbeGzvGCTyHi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The smallest portion of kashk e bademjoon and didn't resemble anything like the actual dish. Kabobs were pretty smelly and chewy. Do not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prasenjit Saha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfpJciSD72pRu23vFeYP8x6Q2wirVttb3-drBXtcgDKosbAyoefQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried chicken kabob plate and chicken wrap here! Liked it. Ambiance is good but the service seems to be slow!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb9rzW7QE&fid=0x0:0x55402142cb567666"],"When":"2024-7-27"},{"Name":"Shlomi Horev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9vH13XFPJnipnJusY-4sAC00o-gLlqUtF6MX0e17LP1ckcwoIWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You can't go wrong with Persian food! The chicken, the beef, and the kabbab were all delicious, highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVH1-gtShVQRLpMfArUBkaatTvP9qtVSYwdnP0N1rVb3cDC7hp4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the lamb wrap and the beef wrap, they were so good!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dawn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWLTBFiXcJVuoU_JZpUWFTzylTcpSDmvcthmw9mJ0WW3ZmHCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I loved the CARNIVORE Grilled Cheese!  It's a patty melt type with a burger and caramelized onions.  The five cheese blend is delicious and you choose your sauce.  It was nice and crispy.  The whole thing was so delicious and my new favorite!

Really good, spicy Buffalo Mac & Cheese.  I like spicy and it has a kick.  The other pastas were good if you don't like spicy.  I like that you can build your own if you want, or customize toppings.

I have had it delivered a few times when I am in the mood for this type of thing, and I have always been happy with it.  It's got a very home-cooked feel to it.  So it doesn't look fancy, but tastes comforting and is quite filling.   The pasta has been cooked perfectly every time.  Impressive.  I like the sturdy noodles they use too.

At first glance, the burger looked tiny and overdone.  But, it was really good too.  I kept it plain with just cheese, onions and Garlic aioli.  I would definitely order it again.  Same with the Nashville Hot Grilled Cheese.  It has Buffalo Chicken inside.

This is a Food Court location by offices, so closed on the weekend and closes at 6 pm.  Tricky hours.  I haven't actually eaten there, but the delivery has been perfect every time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID93cufqwE&fid=0x0:0xe6f6f3f27d2e26d7"],"When":"2024-3-20"},{"Name":"Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKBDt6drU2R7cHupE2ez7V-GvOUbyORhTMaLvsbJAsFyilouQCmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have ordered the Buffalo Mac & Cheese a few times and it was delicious. I also enjoyed the Truffle Mac & Cheese, but the spicy Buffalo was my favorite. It is such Comfort Food! And the noodles were cooked perfectly. I would definitely recommend giving them a try if you like pasta.

It is good to note that this location is closed on the weekends and closes early. I had the food delivered and it travelled really well and they were so quick. I want to actually go there sometime to try the crispy grilled cheese sandwiches with Buffalo Chicken.  Yum.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICNn76G8AE&fid=0x0:0xe6f6f3f27d2e26d7"],"When":"2024-1-19"},{"Name":"Steven Parks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCRp4qPenh71tHbepjMl--pk83NfzDobydpXUt8dtqoIXrj5A0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is located inside of a small food court that is growing next to a business complex. The customer service was excellent. They apologized for the wait time but honestly they didn’t take more than 10-15 minutes for our order so I’m assuming they go faster than that most days which is insane for the quality of food they gave us. The Chicken Pesto Grilled Cheese and Pastrami Grilled Cheese were amazing. The bread was perfectly crunchy on the outside and fluffy on the inside and buttered just right. The Truffle fries were also cooked perfectly, possibly double fried as they were also crunchy outside, and fluffy insides with the perfect amount of truffle and Parmesan flavor. Definitely will be going back. The only downside is they close early probably due to their business being next to an office complex.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx-v6z1gE&fid=0x0:0xe6f6f3f27d2e26d7"],"When":"2023-6-6"},{"Name":"Marc Cole","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcRLAvEuU4qI-cNwiCWMg_qkNnJxMBusT6_P5VTByslW03YnNy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nestled in the heart of San Diego, Grater Grilled Cheese brings a gourmet twist to the grilled cheese sandeich.  On a recent visit I ordered a  pork belly grilled cheese or something of thay nature and it was a revelation. The combination of burnt pork end and melted cheese, and perfectly toasted bread elevated this grilled cheese to new heights. Each bite was a party in my mouth and the pork and BBQ sauce complemented the gooey cheese beautifully.

I also had the parmesean truffle fries, a delight that left me craving more. The crispy fries were drizzled with truffle oil and sprinkled with parmesan cheese, creating an aroma and taste that stuck with me even when I was done!

Grater Grilled Cheese is a must-visit destination in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjwNPNzAE&fid=0x0:0xe6f6f3f27d2e26d7"],"When":"2024-4-16"},{"Name":"Andrew Smythe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2JjdbNIbbccpnXylwpi33Zd67dpHVE-TYdu74-gf8ht8jVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Veggie Grilled Cheese here is without a doubt the best I’ve ever tasted, and the fries are fish and chip shop quality. Everyone should check this place out :).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elena Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6Z4mR3ngb_SWm5OgIzCWeJqJF_mWqI0p7M__mQf7OkBzHIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The patty melt was delicious! Cheesy with nice soft toast & juicy patty. The garlic parm fries were SO good too. I love the crunchy fry with the seasoning still stuck on each fry! Don't even need ketchup. It's already so flavorful. Best fries! Service is very nice too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Upside Over","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzMO9Ptvl3c9FE22wC8cSfXAF2ENTLm04h7e3h3kzORitgNq5W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It's not bad food. I'd just rather spend $12 on a full sized burrito and drink next door at Fiesta Mexican Grille than spend it on essentially a side of mac and cheese with two bites of pork in it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"R Dub! / Ramblin' Randy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgrZK49BKBVqSOx_nsBhbvYJKfbxbZRlCXgiZZSO0mKNwSM5nA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went for the first time today. Had the lobster grilled cheese - fantastic! 10/10! Good value and friendly service. Will return.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yummy poke at The Poke Co. in Mira Mesa! I enjoyed the medium poke bowl with salmon, spicy tuna, and scallops. Lots of good toppings and sauces. Friendly staff and quick service. There are indoor seats as well as a lot of outdoor in the food court. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBE1Rsqrf4U-U5nqfhrorJS&fid=0x0:0x21703737f27f5e11"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Yessica Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwaS1JYIHd7NmBC6poaNz7aA4P6evw2-19utt8cGVpdgUhW44=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have ordered delivery so many times! Truly love the food! They give you big portions and never go easy on the protein! Has become my favorite Poke in San Diego. Always comes fresh with really good sauces, always add my Thai tea too! Would definitely recommend to anyone that is looking for a Poke place that gives great portions and great taste!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzvNCPEw&fid=0x0:0x21703737f27f5e11"],"When":"2024-5-31"},{"Name":"L Swift","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_5WHg_3sTbD9Jb7PXvwc_72GCk_3cfnKYCU7Z47-1BBgXBF_VEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chain like poke place. Lots of great options. Free avocado and crab. Very tasty","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTlA2Ti0XTDu8aYPwTElHo&fid=0x0:0x21703737f27f5e11"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Liz Noska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn6RSLb-im1Y50mNE_ITBHzXyMVdHklC9YjI7qfAxDXGG9ifPU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fresh and flavorful poke bowls. I had never tried the spam musubi, from now on it will be part of my order.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo9vfzNQ&fid=0x0:0x21703737f27f5e11"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Chenlin Lu (Leo)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTskxHqR8xoE1pqAArNcQjrptoj930dqUy9dokes8Jz7spEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall very enjoyable poke experience. The fish tastes very fresh, spicy tuna really brings the heat one would expect, and the rice nicely cooked. All the sides are very tasty, I especially appreciate the Krab salad scoop was mixed with some sweet mayo for some extra flavor, and that the seaweed salad was given in moderate amounts, unlike other places that just dump it on your bowl.
The only suggestion I have is the sauce. I ordered a combination of Co House Sauce and Dragon Breath Sauce, I don't know which one it is but it feels too vinegary and a little overpowering. I would prefer a sweet and savory sauce like that in Poke One N Half, or just reduce the vinegar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICqsuT0Vw&fid=0x0:0x21703737f27f5e11"],"When":"2021-6-1"},{"Name":"Dongheon Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgw7wH2fXL7TSDvgXh9SpIzelvUxTxWgjdLC0e9KCdCeEPBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Perfect place if you are on a diet. Portions are very small. Medium bowl? More like a kids bowl","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlotte AM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWskWqK6d0svU4i6Q9YI5OrCYGmR9bPijRVO5nI_Wd-5itKbTI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I love ordering here! Big proportions and very yummy.

I normally like the Thai tea with boba, but this location put too much ice into the drinks, which water the flavor down so much.
Very sad since I always look forward to it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Darren Ricketts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4a-cmvaoOM6NMU3tCnhuvH4b-K2BrCD1ZG8INxaBRi6whqOnJ5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I wouldn't eat here.  I sat for 15 minutes watching the counter personnel play with their hair, wipe their noses, touch their mouths, cough and generally have zero idea of pathenogenic transference.  They didn't wash their hands after repeatedly contaminating them.  Gross.  They're handling raw food.  This place is a cesspool of germ activity.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Stella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUYMabqNGcfw9rin1JGvxRy0_l-9ZgqmpA9D5ZMSzPRrJELYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean and nice place. The poke bowl and plates look so delicious, and the size of food is quite enough. Have been here several times! It could be busy around lunchtime , and they have separate lines for poke and non-poke plates.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBE4ljXzMpwRShCnvkRMB9I&fid=0x0:0x4b184a99a18d1374"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Justin Schwartz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsv0A44FzFPN5iGrc9NlIWiaMJBEjNmpowvhyrTbr7YVSSbalBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My third time here and the third time there’s been a line, so it’s safe to assume there’s always a line. This place is popular.

In terms of parking, there’s plenty of free spaces since this is an industrial area. And there are always a good number of places to sit (indoor and outdoor).

Let’s get to the food:

Poke
Might run out of some options if you get here later. Typically, you have varieties of salmon and ahi to choose from. Ahi shoyu, miso salmon, cilantro salmon, etc. The quality and freshness make this poke some of the best in San Diego.

Spam musubi
Good! Hard to go wrong with spam musubi.

Mac salad
Not my favorite, honestly.

Poke nachos
Been meaning to get these every time we’re here and now that we finally did, I can say that you get a generous helping of fish and wanton chips. A side of rice is a good idea.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABKqmAT4JP2Gw1ZMhjz4dy&fid=0x0:0x4b184a99a18d1374"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Chris Runde","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUouAGf4CtRS9UrURT_dMooW3hTlMgmFrMOCK1MeKxnq67YbEU6Pw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has some excellent poke, it's the best I've had since I was in Maui! I got the nachos and the poke to wonton nacho ratio was perfect. You get a bite of poke with every bit of nacho. The sauces were great and I will definitely be back while I'm in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuwmuMbyYkMGrjiI2vIuBW&fid=0x0:0x4b184a99a18d1374"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Ysabel T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLW66YB8hOBzmgz401o63afHaWFhRvLKZJQViDgbnjtAsya663i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Trust me, the bowl (2 poke) is definitely enough. I got the garlic salmon, ahi tuna, and the special. All were good and pretty normal for it's price point. I also enjoyed the calamari. Food is normal, service is really fast which is my main priority when i'm hungry, and atmosphere is very... corporate. I highly recommend them for any catered event!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dawn Woodward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPrFEuYxUnUBC35KkuRFdNcymeoK3p0Jvbat6kOBwagCNGGA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our family recently organized a yacht event for the scattering of ashes departing from the San Diego harbor, and I'm truly grateful for the exceptional service provided by Gretchen at De La Vina Catering.

Let's start with the food - it was simply exquisite. Gretchen curated a menu that not only aligned with our vision and dietary preferences but also added a special touch to the entire experience.

But it wasn't just about the food. Gretchen's service was impeccable. Despite an unexpected delay in our excursion, she personally delivered the food, displaying patience, kindness, and professionalism throughout. She also came back to help pack it up!

I wholeheartedly recommend De La Vina Catering. If you're seeking a caterer who not only serves exceptional food but also provides unparalleled service and support, Gretchen and her team are the ones to choose. So professional, went out of their way to make our event successful. Every single attendee commented on the amazing food.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Bass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtQlXOOv1EQylwJ26qCvTqRyqbl3PB-neel9P1x7W5CMsv9SQz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GiGi with De La Vina Catering did such an exceptional job on our recent event for Peers Network in Del Mar. [{"Name":"Jason Nestler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpVz0NQZPi0wi2hL5lCR39RpL5dT9mKthDLNVs3TYxULRnqC6B=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their salsas are perfection, they even have them in big ketchup/mustard plastic bottles for you to enjoy at your table, and their pollo is to die for. I’m avoiding red meat so I’ve tried their pollo nachos but usually get the #9 (two pollo tacos w/ rice and beans) they might have the best beans and rice in San Diego. The experience they deliver is everything you could ask for and more, easily the best service I’ve received in any similar establishment. I discovered this spot in April it’s been my new Saturday tradition to stop by ever since.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDFp4r2Mw&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2023-11-10"},{"Name":"Israel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5vsiwW1tqq14P41mMYE-tCNfbtOZM2ykDy6PUl46Zff5MfTkGvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a food place for Burritos and a quick Mexican food craving.  The peole are friendly, they let me customize my burrito. (That is important to me).  Also they where very fast which is good since they are in a high business area, lots of people have limited time for lunch.  This place is not very expensive my meal only cost me $8.84 (after taxes)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDErc7IAw&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2017-2-1"},{"Name":"Rafael Buelna (Rafael)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfIclbJgYlbToLFztWleTxPpMLyzzydpGLEeFW53Y0I9zzJem2uw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good pollo asado plate that included rice, beans, Pico de gallo and tortillas. Very tasty. Nice friendly staff. Lady keeping all tables clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkqOn9UQ&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2017-10-11"},{"Name":"Kyler Nyhagen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTsc7GTaIV4lxsdP5z9_c2EuOGh95hHOFFABtRsLt4ixPGX5bZPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great food at a reasonable price! My literal only complaint was the bathroom requires you to go in to the kitchen, which feels a little unsanitary. Other than that, I quite enjoyed the food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDV242JTQ&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2023-12-16"},{"Name":"Adri Dominguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ1BhO6wG0i9h86I7tAIQCX59u9qozIVrl2dqpdyEmLH6j3uQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for tacos that make your soul sing and salsa that slaps harder than your abuela’s chancla, this is the place.

From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted like family. The people here are genuinely kind and I can tell that they truly care!

Now, the food? Unreal. The tacos are next-level—perfectly seasoned, juicy fillings wrapped in fresh, warm tortillas that taste homemade (because they probably are). Each bite feels like a love letter to flavor. The burritos? Absolute perfection. They’re the just-right size—hearty, but not heavy—and packed with flavor in every bite. No filler, just fire. And let’s talk about the salsa. Whether you like it smoky, spicy, or zesty, their salsa game is elite. Honestly, it deserves its own cult following.

This isn’t just a taco shop—it’s a sanctuary for your taste buds, and a reminder that good food + good people = magic. Do yourself a favor: come hungry, and leave glowing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joseph Gallo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAM2xq2i8urLtP5TMmRoI39mXg-l5v-YPqETv_VwjhTI4PeXty=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been coming here a long time since it was Nico's, and it's always been very good. Some of the people still work there and the quality is just as good.  The great food is only surpassed by the people who work here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZg6HRIA&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2023-9-16"},{"Name":"L S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUH8_Xn5Ily3EyP0T6UVTYF17cng82oMKfKEnxw-pkIMjSn02bvwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Ordered fish taco combo. The order was ready quick. However, the fish in the taco looked very unappetizing. I wonder if this is one of those frozen fish sticks that are about to expire.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEosCT2AE&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2018-12-4"},{"Name":"patrick horton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu7rjGzeiKm5Z3nPEbr0yCRFPxTwy4jwkLI7oiOG4Psw7EmtAB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best street tacos I have had here in north San Diego in this small place near gravity heights !
The price was just right! Thank you Armando’s !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpsOrpygE&fid=0x0:0xad2e909702c64e51"],"When":"2023-8-14"}]

All Aspects Catering had the best pricing and options for what we were looking for, and I am soooo happy we went with them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6-6Z-zFWN92MlIh7nEHJVNhTV9CQGxK5abqce0P_Go6NMaG31=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Simon and the All Aspects catering team truly delivered for our wedding of 100 guests. He came highly recommended from our wedding venue at the Inn at Sunset Cliffs, and we would 100% recommend him for any future catering and bartending needs in the San Diego area. We had utilized their team for catering and bartending throughout our reception. From the planning beforehand and tastings, to the wedding day it was truly a seamless process from set up/cooking on site, cocktail hour and dinner during our reception. Simon personally helped us tailor our vision and find options that fit within our budget. Our guests were raving about how delicious the appetizers and dinner were for weeks to follow. We cannot express our gratitude enough for their team and everything they did to help our wedding day go better than we could've dreamed! Definitely recommend the caprese sliders and strawberry crostinis as apps, for dinner we did a buffet style with chicken alfredo, bolognese rigatoni and eggplant caponata, then churros for dessert. Definitely book All Aspects for your wedding!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6TlmNu1FRjRlJQYUW5jZz&fid=0x0:0x2fe6b1b5db795d77"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Bree Knight","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVVLbEeWrVh2iNbJKhcythjCwC6AqGhHEz-yszvMYda1IRCwCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used All Aspects Catering for my wedding a couple of weeks ago, and I truly cannot recommend them enough. We chose an all-inclusive option for our event and had them handle our chair rentals as well, which took a huge weight off our shoulders and prevented a lot of stress.
The food was absolutely amazing! Many of our guests commented that both the food and service felt like they were dining at a high-quality restaurant. The staff was professional, attentive, and made the whole experience seamless.
The bar service was also excellent. We brought in our own alcohol, and the bartender went above and beyond, even improvising with what we had to create specialty drinks when we started running low on certain options. Our guests loved it!
All Aspects Catering truly exceeded our expectations in every way. Delicious food, fantastic service, and a team that genuinely cares about making your day special. Highly, highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"will moses","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_ZkJ7MADL9aFVDtngRfCd1i0JRHFNAfgDx7ff8Pdg0_uN2Gpd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All aspects catering did a phenomenal job with our wedding. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Momo Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGFwqPw_kZKXRU2rnAA1Sk_koYilp8-PD1FKKySSZEoyDVfHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A Shanghai-style home cooking small-plate buffet. We went on a Sunday and it was 28 per person. The selection is rich and varied, with dishes stir-fried fresh and served hot. Spicy dishes are optional and can be chosen based on your preference.

There are also dim sum, soy milk, and sweet rice wine glutinous rice balls available. New dishes keep coming out throughout the meal — not everything is offered at the same time — which makes it fun to try different items.

Overall, it’s great value for the price and definitely a place you could come back to often.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlVxNZQOPAf5Qgj_9xktPI&fid=0x0:0xa68b9852cb3a326"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Samuel Mansour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFe7fTFrlGFemswCiziCPjVG4d9qit-E6Lm30sSIsZqZWe8ww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience with Ma Dasao. From the moment I arrived, I felt genuinely welcomed and taken care of. The service was warm, professional, and attentive — they truly go above and beyond for their customers.

The atmosphere is relaxing, clean, and inviting. You can tell they take pride in what they do because every detail is thoughtful and done with care. I left feeling refreshed, happy, and grateful for the wonderful experience.

If you’re looking for a place that treats you with kindness, professionalism, and real hospitality, Ma Dasao is absolutely worth visiting. Highly recommended I’ll definitely be coming back.

Sam M.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbFuz95OftAw9nXJdT8Z8p&fid=0x0:0xa68b9852cb3a326"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Lucy Z.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRm51xFP7CXzSgdFn7u_me9dRvxrr2dp_PYaUr2VFAnw0C3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Plenty of parking and a very spacious restaurant.
They offer an all-you-can-eat option for $20 (before tax) for dinner from Monday to Friday, with Saturdays being about $5 more. I believe their weekday lunch deal is even cheaper.

You can take as many of the small dishes as you want, and everything we tried was really flavorful and satisfying. What I liked most is that the all-you-can-eat includes items from the regular menu, different kinds of noodles, wontons, rice dishes, and more.

We went on a Saturday for lunch, and they were offering more of a Chinese breakfast-style selection, including dim sum and porridge, which was a great touch. Overall, I really enjoyed the food and will definitely be coming back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gahee Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGVYOIEWD7YaYAnqjikBrzd46CaPZGx9q__3cQy5Kmp9Ngmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible service! I was there to pick up my Uber Eat order and the food wasn't ready. The kitchen lady yelled me saying "we don't take Uber order!" If the restaurant doesn't accept the Uber order, why is it even available on Google online order option and Uber Eat option?! You guys need to notify the 3rd party and there should be no confusion. This wasn't the first time they did not prepare the food on time. The online order was made and they weren't even prepping the food and saying "oh the computer system did not give the order to the kitchen". Horrible service, so many errors and wasting time. People who use this restaurant work in 8-5 job with limited lunch time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWJDraIwwDWYSjitsg4H5HpqJSJ_BNGzc9h9lmKyNk16lh32yN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"$63 for two people for all-you-can-eat, so it was not as good a value as it first appeared. The food quality was questionable, and nothing was labeled, so I had no idea what was inside the dumplings. You are supposed to be able to order extra items through your server, but our server never came to the table, and I had to ask someone at the register instead. The food was also quite oily, which made it hard to eat much and did not justify the price. We will not be coming back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dragor Cochrane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzlwxMdqTW87jJolBSA3lN9aFX1RKzY_HUgSEpP8JGczMzYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super great deal. Tastiness varies based on how busy it is , maybe cause sometimes the chef gets worn out?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9LhQlgDMMN2T9hHO0dyke&fid=0x0:0xa68b9852cb3a326"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Tina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPN4XdhUaCANbi5iNRTfBWSsCZDMjcceXW24jY5aG4ALft6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a so-called lunch go-to place for Qualcomm employees because of its location.
We went here for lunch on weekend with friends. All staff were very friendly and accommodating. The dishes are delicious. Good atmosphere and clean.
Will come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDd_9uZlwE&fid=0x0:0xa68b9852cb3a326"],"When":"2024-2-29"},{"Name":"David Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhEVt1yhVnSl5bqT5cGimvf7OZR3o_03ALe_mios5HJq4a6ONqPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place tucked away off of Mira Mesa. I’ll be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHZfJDmdZ2oUYwBeKah37J&fid=0x0:0xa68b9852cb3a326"],"When":"2025-12-14"}]

Doesn’t say hi, welcome to Chick-fil-A, How may I help you?” simply takes my order with the most minimal human interaction possible.  I tried to scan the app. The reader wasn’t working. She offered no help. I had to ask her twice did it take my scan.  After I handed her the money for the order, she took forever to give me change,  because she was more interested in what was going on at the other register with another customer, who came up to the counter after me.  After handing me my change, she just looks at me blank faced and doesn’t even say thank you.  The  restroom was filthy and both trash cans are overflowing.   After I ate when I went to get a refill.  the shift supervisor got it for me and when she brings it back, she puts on a forced smile and says my pleasure. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Efrain Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1K3KtEoikRDKiJIBJ58lZa9oKFAhvQw1C-UD121uZh9ukfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went in for dinner after a long day and honestly it was a pretty solid experience overall. The place had a relaxed vibe, nothing fancy but comfortable enough to sit and enjoy your food. I ordered a classic pepperoni and a slice of veggie, and both were cooked well with a nice crust, not too soggy. Cheese tasted fresh and the sauce wasn’t overly sweet, which I liked. Service was friendly, though it took a few extra minutes during the rush, but nothing annoying.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kunal Singla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOyqqTeKFuxKuB_1hg0vL_qwM6nfNw2kBPPsNN2VCNTVz91YcStw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I gave Knockout Pizzeria two tries — once grabbing a slice, and another time ordering a couple fresh pies to see how it holds up straight out of the oven. The staff member was super friendly and I appreciated how affordable the menu is, especially with some solid deals. Delivery time was as expected.

That said, the pizza itself didn’t quite land for me. The single slice I bought tasted a bit stale (would not recommend), and even the fresh pie I got for my office team members, while better, was very greasy and had quite a bit of flop. The crust has a nice thin base and some flavor, but it was a bit chewy. They all told me to not order from here again. :(

I think if they baked the pizzas a little longer, cut down on the oil, and used fresher ingredients, this place could really shine — even if it meant raising the price a bit.

Right now, it feels like budget pizza, and personally, I’d rather just grab a slice at Costco. But with a few improvements, it has the potential to be something great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuKjD2Q5-KKtFqixKIRejJ&fid=0x0:0x3d5f95686f6c74e2"],"When":"2025-6-20"},{"Name":"Josh Tardieu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVrjFgMpAlMADEACOGFudUpLsgS6ptB1O7FJGIjXUst1YVmATm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was pretty good, randomly pricey for whatever reason. Service wasn't bad they noted help was wanted but other than that I would do it again, but the pricing for a slice of pizza by itself seemed to be close to $4-$5 unless you ordered a lunch special  which was
2 slices and drink $ 8.50 3 slices and drink for $11.
Deff better than one slice.
Pizza doe not bad cooked with a light crunch like it should.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7vJGlJA&fid=0x0:0x3d5f95686f6c74e2"],"When":"2024-8-13"},{"Name":"Undercover Astrology","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSJnOulsfG1XLEsFzimZsuDtXbaWTUFmGUbvtzBtE2uKux5Hg2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"05/06/2022

I ordered the lunch special 3 slices and soda for $8.75. I got the meat bomb, pepperoni and pesto slices. The crust is thin and crunchy. The meat slices were a little greasy. The soda I got from the fountain machine tasted off. Like the fountain dispenser wasn't cleaned or the water needed to be filtered. There is indoors and outdoors seating. Located in a shopping plaza with an Aldi and other stores and restaurants. Decent sized parking lot. I would definitely come back for more slices.

Never again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chris ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3NR6TKT-ZhI1bx5g2g5hdqxPwqWU0vG1yev1Tn4s1tSUC2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a couple of donuts in the morning on my way to an appointment.  The chocolate with peanuts was very good. Above average.  Went back by after my appointment and had two sandwiches.   Both were very good but they took forever to make them.    We were the only ones waiting so I’m not sure why so slow. But they were good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDti6eWnQE&fid=0x0:0x1afab6e3df9cf3e6"],"When":"2024-2-7"},{"Name":"Kelly Leano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI983CPNclUQk1n_Z_tGtq_E5h4cFfFQ9m6vnbIvuJPqQMM3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Donuts were nice and fresh. [{"Name":"Monica Sullivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcoUKL6yGR_VRN8g75chttsKOoEOcv_2qqI-ktzmOfKpG00Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cheryl and Dean at Metro have been catering office functions for my company for many years now and they never fail to deliver delicious, fresh, beautiful food. They are always on time and always exceed expectations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sara Barbat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpU0q9Z0CC-5v7nvOYUtx2yAaVyHBlHbf9107znQ6ndoe4Rg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Metro Catering never disappoints!  I have used Metro for personal functions as well as corporate events for the past 10 years.  Cheryl always comes through with wonderfully prepared entrees using the most incredible ingredients which makes for super memorable events.  On a number of occasions, I have used the “seasonal to go” menu to be the star of birthday parties and even last minute, guests-are-in-town weekday dinner.   The food choices and menu items have always been top notch and I continue to recommend Metro Catering to all of my friends, neighbors and work colleagues.  Cheryl is always helpful in walking you through her featured and popular items, aids in menu planning and is prompt and thorough in her communication.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Jurist","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXx2ryo_LzeRsu_7shFxqluC-r9SNkcxkt12qUx2kNfZ5njNTW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t recommend Metro Catering enough! We hired them for my daughter’s wedding! They were so easy to work with, got right back to me whenever I had questions. They have lots of creative menu ideas! Everything went really smoothly on the day of her wedding. I didn’t have to worry about anything. Plus everything looks so pretty! You can tell they really cared about taking good care of us and making sure my daughter and her husband were personally catered to the whole day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jameson Brooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIc0jNJnl4rF-n3xuzq0iWH_ARjBvC1cuZvoMNVE3U9DGTMAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Metro checks all of the boxes.
Cheryl does a fantastic job with menu ideation/creation. Her consultative approach takes a lot of the stress out of planning an event. Her years of expertise shine through her diverse assortment of culinary offerings. Service is first class. Don’t miss out on this phenomenal caterer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1LjSmvrvdp4wZDNW3MoCMwmdAyIhRcjZWKjJN3olQYGgxJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cheryl makes awesome food, she is always coming up with new tasty menu items and is willing to work within your budget. The ordering & delivery process is very smooth and easy. I highly recommend Metro Catering for all your catering needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Hai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHlFomU4nfiqZ-UK_Ns69OsjoM-vYJgpCQFGNW3KFTNYP_ww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We go back with Metro 22 years to the original "Dining Club". Since then we have travelled the world eating and drinking and always return with the comment that Cheryl & Dean are up there with the best of them. Simply put very good food, consistent throughout the years. Whenever we are in San Diego we have to have (h2h) something from Metro.

***** Always perfect *****

Karen & Anthony H.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbHThnQQbyfUydx3Ekv7rSbVD2UdJ_qnS9AILFm4RNXst-jnhtgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cheryl catered our anniversary party for about 50.  She and her staff were perfect.  She devised a perfect Mediterranean menu early in the process, maintained regular communication to ensure everything was organized exactly right, and presented a multi-course buffet that every guest raved about.

Maximum professionalism, timeliness, and quality.  Will definitely use Metro again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia Bobic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtQLVidg4ZyCwDL39LinjeRalfV0zLFA7P80QlvgqFfjvHgcc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hi Cheryl, Thank you very much for the awesome service and the fantastic food! I recommend it to everyone who is interested in having a terrific way to impress clients, family or friends with a great creative experience. Great job!! I look forward to you taking care of us at future events.
Sophia B.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"RunnerMom123","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfnSFWXMd1oJu73a6IhdtgibYcjse2HKQTHeghNQd9Cyw8DYQQJZDCyh-TD68ehXuY-FA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Whenever I travel for business to San Diego, I stay at the Courtyard Marriott San Diego Sorrento Valley. It is clean, modern, and centrally located. The staff is excellent. I stayed there last week and made a mistake on my reservation. The manager was extremely gracious and was able to quickly help me resolve the situation. I felt very well taken care by the Courtyard team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Giang Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX05gqxkLXF2OLyKrFXUVUuESbVmkr_JuQ0DByZj7DZC8_vp4vj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It wasn't bad, but it felt a little less nice than other courtyards I've stayed at recently. There was some big AC unit sitting in the hall way when I was heading out -- not a big deal but I just felt it should not have been left out unattended in the hall way like that.

In the shower, the hot water was very strong, good for winter time. But it was impossible to get high water pressure with cool water, which wasn't super great for the summer.

Finally, the price point was significantly higher than I had expected -- I am not exactly familiar with this area, so maybe it's just standard -- but altogether this leads me to give a 3 ⭐ just ok.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIpDEI4DhRDDsmpN7AuieY&fid=0x0:0x4b9a1c70acf25e4b"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Brenda Hatch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjcIGMMHQK22H-Nq8F1gikkXWfPZxyNSgoJXZsqT6kxbkogQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I wanted to use an eGift card to pay for some of my stay. This eGift card came from Marriott as it was my birthday week. But none of the front desk could handle it. I was overcharged for the stay instead of being able to use the eGift card to reduce by bill. I had to spend 2 in person conversations/ 5 emails and 2 phone calls before the issue was sorted. It was a frustrating experience!

Definitely not a Mariott like experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sourabh Das","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaZCNQl8YMS8yqGbH-6yv6j36GHRxr_266PqgZMELuxpTArHAj3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Very average experience compared to Marriott standards. No room service. No bathroom essentials like tooth brush or shaving set. Also I opted for green initiative and because of that no one even came to do the bed.
Location is good, some restaurants you would find nearby.
For breakfast, you have to take from Starbucks. Its a set menu. So if you are staying for a week or so, same breakfast almost.
Qualcomm and some other nearby offices for business travelers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC-9kO4yY94-8Ca72QgBe4i&fid=0x0:0x4b9a1c70acf25e4b"],"When":"2025-8-20"},{"Name":"B9804QMjasonh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We were forced to stay here for a soccer tournament. I took my coupon and went to try it. Ordered Western bagel, amazed to see like 10 variety of bagels to choose from, there are mini ovens to bake the bagel, bagel turned out really good and warm. Then went to bill with the coupon and the staff behaviour suddenly changed as if They are giving it for free, came second time and same behaviour from staff. Staff can really need to improve on there attitude. The place is good, but staff behaviour is a minus for me. Bagel size is small, three variety of coffees to choose from. Taking out 2 star for staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICe3_Og9AE\u0026fid=0x0:0x62f67052de276636"],"When":"2022-9-28"},{"Name":"Edson Reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj-ogd4RXE0NqVaSm-7A7TQRaRVQv-U3sMjfS5INGgFX9yxD8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Was greeted politely by staff member. Ordered a salmon bagel, staff member asked what bread I'd like, I wasn't sure what the selection was and right while I was choosing within 10 seconds, staff member stepped away without another word and didn't return. Another polite staff member started and completed my order. Food was good, just ate it while irritated.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Logan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAhC3ogHOVG8lIdKR30gYQDIGafPCZnUqeHgzZFoh-PljlVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bruegger’s Bagels has become one of my absolute favorite go-to spots, especially on busy mornings when I need something comforting, flavorful, and fast. There’s just something about walking into a Bruegger’s and smelling the fresh bagels baking that instantly puts me in a better mood. No matter how hectic my morning might be, I know I can count on Bruegger’s to give me that little moment of peace — and a seriously good bagel — before I dive into the rest of my day. I usually switch between a jalapeño cheese bagel with cream cheese and a plain or jalapeño bagel loaded with ham, egg, and cheese. Both options are absolutely delicious. The jalapeño cheese bagel has that perfect little kick to it, balanced by the smooth, creamy richness of the cream cheese. And when I’m hungrier or need something more filling before a long workday, the ham, egg, and cheese sandwich totally hits the spot. The bagels are always fresh and chewy with just the right amount of crispness on the outside, and the flavor is so satisfying — bold, rich, and super well-made. One of the things I appreciate most is how quick and reliable the service is. Even on a rough morning, I know I can walk in, order, and have my bagel hot and ready in about five minutes. That convenience makes a huge difference when I’m trying to get to my corporate office on time but still want something that feels homemade and hearty. I usually eat it right there before heading in to start my day, and those few minutes of enjoying a warm, fresh bagel always help ground me. Bruegger’s isn’t just a bagel place to me — it’s part of my routine, part of what helps me push through the tough mornings and feel a little more ready to take on the day. There’s comfort in knowing I can rely on them for good food, good service, and a little calm in the middle of the morning rush. I just love Bruegger’s, and I’ll always keep coming back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joshua Ventura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV64Joey--CuoqzSuc1lkVc2uR9lIZv_b6zvdqnAWwuFP6e27A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I work for a local company downtown and was tasked with ordering bagels for our monthly onsite breakfast. Initially, I tried to place an order with Bruegger's Bagels on Scripps, but after several days of unsuccessful attempts to reach someone, I decided to contact this location instead. The staff here were exceptionally friendly, and the manager efficiently handled my large order, ensuring everything was ready before my arrival. There was no wait time, and the staff's friendliness was remarkable. I highly recommend using this location for all your Bruegger's Bagel needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S Jafari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8LdV0E2AIjchwj4w6PMugep9C5ac2CGyYRPcCm9tBvETxKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I asked for everything bagel and two eggs on it. I’m guessing that they’re putting the bagels in the microwave with the eggs to warm it up because my bagel was kind of soggy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evonne London","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtacH7veC9gKkMiwjyxIvGBQ6Yon0ItQamkof3e5OXogMGlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place! I usually get breakfast bagels and the food is always fresh, hot, and delicious. The bagels are the best. I have also tried the iced coffee drinks which are also tasty.  Customer service is on point and restaurant/seating area is very clean. Would highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy Duffy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJS6HMB6WI_RBs09Y6pdVkBMi5nd-hr_Qr6w0poW6nfiyHBPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Not as good as it used to be. I was disappointed because I used to love Bruegger's but the bagel breakfast sandwich I had was really bad and the iced coffee was weak.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatiana Kotas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKeguSNPwuOnflaifPNSdg--fsWyoBhhdg2kFBHd2wUtXvQGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time in for me, the tall Asian girl behind the counter was very pleasant and polite (she was also training another team member and seemed very patient). The bagels were pretty good. Good flavor and density. I’ll definitely be back to try more of the menu. The cheese they use on the breakfast bagels could be upgraded but other than that no complaints.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Justin Fan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSW7AloYFq75g_4ANOhsDza1o5zNZCzrJrsMJrAfVchGGz1pbk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Signature Karak Chai: 9.5/10 Tastes as good as going to any of my Desi friends’ houses. Lots of rich masala spices, especially cardamom. Even though you cannot change the sweetness, it was not too sweet and very rich and smooth. A definite try.

Karak Latte: 9.5/10 Very good too. If I compare it to the chai, the coffee makes the spices a little more subdued but deeper in flavor. If you want coffee, get this! The dark roast is perfect and compliments the spices perfectly.

Gulab Jamun Milk Cake: 8/10 A solid cake. Like other middle eastern cafes, they make these sort of tres lethe style cakes. This one did not really taste like gulab jamun to me because I associate it so much with the rich syrup it soaks in, but it does have a cardamom-forward flavor that is generally desi. The top layer tastes like Cool-Whip to me, so it’s whatever.
Ambiance: Clean and new, lots of space to do work. Very casual and family friendly.

Service: Service was fast and friendly, could not ask for much more.

Parking: Parking lot. Easy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEk-SaGQQmm5kbEj2moFg-&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Daniela Alvarado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8ClpJSPJK9QN649Kq2a9HHQm0Vn5oY8wWXRkYnNP6q-MkYLDz7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I stopped in for some caffeine because I really needed a pick me up. There was a pretty big line when I got in and almost all the tables inside had people sitting in them. I waited in line for about 10 minutes before they took my order.

I got an iced Matcha Latte with vanilla sweetener,  oatmilk and pistachio cream as well as a hazelnut macaroon. The macaroon was pretty good but way smaller than any macaroon I've seen.. but the matcha latte didn't taste that great.. I'm pretty sure I received a latte with whole milk instead of oatmilk.. the flavor was very off to me and I ended up throwing it away unfortunately..

Overall a really cute place but I think there's bigger out there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoEWpBCvckIX8RN01hDspO&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice sweets and drinks (great experience) with unique flavors. Once we saw their cheesecake, we realized these are Muse cheesecakes. We asked them, and they indeed acknowledged that their vendor is Muse (maybe one of the best, if not the best, cheesecake makers in SoCal).
We enjoyed both the drink and cheesecake a lot and highly recommend this place.
Very cute place too, by the way!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBB3hVdgE25EUvQAZT0raIA&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Karina Mikhalchuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVipGoHrWvEzglvdIB58BFVQT0zLHolx7jTnFQa6vWq_yCdLlgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was so pleasantly surprised by this place. Got matcha, which was good. Am dthey have fancy pistachio one too. Lots of yummy pastries and cakes. Croissant was good, nice and flaky. Seating inside and outside. Definitely recommend this place and will be coming back to try that basque cheesecake.
Another amazing perk is they are open super late , till 10 pm and some days 11 pm. Which is so rare! Staff was very attentive","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfbaPa8OYxhzPGIVGb_VJ7&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Debbie’s Picks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9cxfNNqYL3nMZt0qX69E5OZi3YyuwWFJYldkvh5QwKdMmHME=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Karak House is an elegant little coffee and chai shop in Sorrento Valley. They specialize in Indian and Middle Eastern flavors such as cardamom, rose, and pistachio.

The shop is peaceful and pretty, with indoor and outdoor seating. The staff is very friendly, with excellent customer service.

I got a Cardamom Latte and Almond Croissant. Both were delicious! I was pleased that the cardamom flavor was aromatic and noticeable.

They have an extensive beverage, pastry, and dessert menu. Drink prices range from $6-$7, and food is from $4-$14. ($14 for a slice of Basque cheesecake)

They have plenty of tables for 4, so it’s good for friends or business meet-ups.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCax8GWcW92LRSaytC0taDT&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Christina Van Oosten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8VsQnJfWTpeH_xVkDwB4k0R3UCmme08V-t_v7eOOqPZYg2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute place, nice atmosphere and nice music selections at a reasonable volume. Too many places are annoyingly loud. Good selection if signature lattes- rose latte 🌹  was perfect. Definitely will be back. Would love to try a gluten free version of the
Milk cakes they looked delicious 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuWgK09kx6QUh0XNYt-cjI&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Rola Abushaban","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTJk3BBlqZ4jNN1jqBY7MjWSWzzhOy41VhFlpPkrC6Rz8ZkBA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of visiting this coffee shop and was thoroughly impressed. The Karak chai was exceptional—rich, aromatic, and perfectly balanced in both spice and sweetness. It is evident that great care goes into its preparation, as it was one of the finest I have tasted. The dessert selection was equally remarkable, both visually appealing and delicious, making for an ideal complement to the chai. The ambiance of the shop was warm and inviting, and the staff provided attentive and courteous service throughout my visit. Overall, this establishment delivers a truly memorable experience, and I highly recommend it to anyone seeking quality tea, delightful desserts, and a refined atmosphere","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwt4VR99M_HcENL7IN3cuk&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Kartik Puri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO9ZAaQEsrIAF8OuVhuBcpnlDuFTeglyl8K8u8J6ATSoCvyueN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Karak has quickly become my new favorite local coffee shop. I am a sucker for good chai, and when I saw they opened up close to me and have Karak Chai on the menu, I knew I had to give it a try. It did not disappoint! I was there the opening week, and I have been back regularly since then. If you like South Asian / Middle Eastern style chai (the one with milk & spices) then you're gonna love this. Other items on the menu are pretty good as well.

It's a great place to hangout at with a group of friends (especially the outdoor seating) but also a great place to get some work done in the day. I am usually there 2-3 afternoons a week as I get to work remotely, and I see lots of other remote workers/students. It's not too loud and the ambience is perfect to get some deep work done, accompanied by a cup of two of karak chais, of course. Also love that it's open so late! Cannot recommend the place enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0aKTjs-HzpTsukelZn6ju&fid=0x0:0x63d52ae8651f163a"],"When":"2025-11-5"}]

Garlic naan was more like cilantro naan.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gil Corpuz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcgJXJ9BMDvSfS4mSxOfp0MD1F39EW0HAIwXAMJcm2TYeXvjmKNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here for dinner with my wife on a Tuesday. They brought out our tray and helped us get plastic forks and spoons.  The food had good spice level, which we asked for medium.  Although my wife said her spice wasn't there.  I ordered the lamb curry, which the flavor was good.  Good, but not the best I had.  Same for my wife's butter chicken curry.  The naan was not as thick, but was enough for the meal.  The place is small and maintained.  This was our first Indian restaurant for San Diego, so it would be unfair to compare with other Indian restaurants at this time and decide if it is a place we'd come back to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJze3OUg\u0026fid=0x0:0x32e83554342b387"],"When":"2023-7-21"},{"Name":"Safiullah Iman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrlfawTVWIe3xpnru1_u5f51i9ADjcBmGfJGx-YdhJ-vbefV4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The the staff is very polite.
