That was NOT filet mignon. The meat was tough and chewy like rubber. I could not eat it. It was definitely a different and cheaper cut of beef. The Spring Rolls were very good..that’s it!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Without Limitations","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwokIxJHQmed6ng5JVs6LJoAS3XUerpdt0NSxwMjyvmGrmsuXJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This place has the best Pho 🍲 I’ve had in San Diego. That’s why I ordered the French Beef Stew

Unfortunately it was disappointing on several levels.

They advertise a Baguette 🥖 as an option over rice. I was really looking forward to dipping that crunchy bread into the stew. Instead I got a Mexican roll that’s soft and not very good when you dip it in the sauce.

The portions seem off? Not sure if it’s because I got it to go or if 3 cubes of meat and 5 carrot 🥕 chunks is normal?  It wasn’t worth $13

Flavors in the stew are good and the meat is extra tender.  Think they reheat your portion when you order.  Very good flavor just nothing to the meal??

I’m glad I got the rice 🍚 too or I would still be hungry. I recommend the PHO here don’t go with this stew unless they have a REAL baguette 🥖

3 stars for stew flavor only, the meal was not worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICusejOGQ&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2022-7-30"},{"Name":"Allie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKBDt6drU2R7cHupE2ez7V-GvOUbyORhTMaLvsbJAsFyilouQCmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this food! My favorite dish is the Filet on rice. I usually get it with the broken rice, which is a little extra fried, but the white rice is really good too. The meat is super tender and super flavorful! It’s a great deal too with a generous portion and nice little side salad.

I just tried the egg rolls for the first time tonight and they’re some of the best egg rolls I’ve ever had! I think they have curry spice or something, so delicious! The sauce that comes with the eggs rolls and salad is amazing too. I actually like putting it on my rice and meat for the extra flavor!

The fresh lemonade is also fantastic. It’s got some lime in it too and is so refreshing! Thank you for my delicious meal! 😁","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL1f-9ggE&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Michael Pham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVckHQeOptDmAzc-Bon7WloiRME0LB69kGJipkxZVNtDWPSPM1z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic, been wanting to try this for myself after hearing mixed reviews.  The service and staff we're great.  Friendly and attentive - water was kept topped off without having to ask.

We came mid week at 1130 and we're luckily able to get a table for 5 right away, after that the place started filling up however not to the point that people were waiting outside.

We shared egg rolls and spring rolls, both served with respective dipping sauce (lettuce with the egg rolls).  Great for sharing!  Both traditional and fresh!  Spring rolls were nice and soft, ingredients were all in the right place for a home made taste.

We also tried the Pho (P2) and Pho Bo Kho (P6) - i'm generally picky about the broth needing to be balanced, not to rich and definitely not bland.  For both of them, they were really spot on!  I would recommend this place to friends as i think it was that good and IMO authentic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk2rrUcQ&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2019-4-16"},{"Name":"Zhu Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLLb5SK_sVga87vU4QmJSp6ohRCO2sKAiXsR0s3Zkk_CYrtyc4Sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had lunch here many times. Always good. Everything is fresh and the quality of meats have been consistently good. Excellent grilled pork chops, pho and spring rolls.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBstWpqQE&fid=0x0:0xb94ea3db18a30197"],"When":"2023-1-16"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Lazykitten251 x","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCWDm5t8pf00ZPONWt1uzupOZKrY2InSMRrcy3BmB7JfyMNcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Its very good .very cozy place. Got the upside down halo halo 8/10 stars very good for Uber lovers. Got the macha monster 8.5/10 stars it has alot of cookie crumbs if they had more Macha it would be 10/10 stars. Great place will come again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4IKVG7180nB2T0AytRwZJ\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2025-8-6"},{"Name":"Thuy Phan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKx4e8TJHciGgea0KqblHjNzasjR4kqIOxilezIUCslQ4MujME=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"CAFE 86 IS BAAAACK!!! They used to be in the Seafood City plaza but moved. I was so sad when they closed but I’m glad they were able to relocate to another spot close to Mira Mesa! I love going here, one of my favorite spots to get SEA desserts and drinks. You can never go wrong 😌 got their Matcha Pandan Latte for freeeee and also love their tres leches cake and ube flan cupcake!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRIXtAElL3lU_oNB9QHc3Z\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Phelan Riessen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQG3HThoO7Ni6Ho9jcA_o5WLf3st85QIVoGTa0TV-U8bMSB2Zp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by for the upside down halo-halo (which is always amazing!) and decided to try the new matcha pandan latte as well. It was my first time having pandan (grass plant), and I really enjoyed the smooth blend of matcha and coconut milk, with a subtle, refreshing twist from the pandan. A unique and delicious combo I’ll definitely be back for.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwtZpIsH2MY2afn8O9NATo\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"lovely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInP_ygnHJFL1Ne_POoOgZ9UnFiibcTGrZ4HkBHuDnebBGAFlA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Flan ube cupcake is good, service is amazing everyone is so sweet, but drinks not so much :( this is my 3rd coffee drink from here and it’s not good honestly, I’ll probably come back to try the halo halo or a diff drink and update this review","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sidharth Mehta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXvtJ--MNCtTe6piyf_QvZ80DAFPD37qb1y311CbK_cZfnZSeh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I ordered a upside-down Halo milkshake. Its a little pricy but it has good quantity and lot of stuff in it, like Boba, ive cream, flan, flakes, candied fruit and ube milkshake. I am not sure about the combination but individually everything felt good quality. Also tried the ube cheesecake and ube flan cupcake, the concept is good. I doubt that i will be a repeat customer. Maybe the less gimicky stuff is worth it. The cafe itself has a good ambience and the staff is polite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1yezSbg\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2024-1-8"},{"Name":"Maria Luu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpDp8LmAqJoZrTIp0c41DPS16OTAUgXdaMv3ptHcjOfVZZtvU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've only been here twice so far but service and food have been amazing and excellent both times. Both young ladies are very welcoming when i've come in and always greet everyone as they walk in. The inside is a little dark and maybe moody but it's also a bit trendy and kind of like a \"get away\" zone from the outside. There's plenty of seating and the atmosphere is quiet. When i first walked in there was a couple studying/doing homework and another person reading. It's a cute little cafe and i like that i can go in, sit down, read a book and not be bothered. My first time was a walk in order and i didn't have to wait long even though i ordered 4 drinks and a few desserts. I got a biscoff cookie smoothie, an oreo smoothie, an ube monster?, a classic halo halo, 2 ube truffles, a cupcake and something else. Everything was sooo good, my kids stole the drinks and i got to eat the desserts haha. My second order was an online order and when i walked in to pick it up the girl handed it to me and asked if i needed any utensils or napkins. Their ube truffles are my absolute favorite item here and i could probably die happy eating one. Their halo halo is also good and so are all the drink options they offer. Honestly, i'm glad they opened a location here and i hope they continue to thrive and do great. Their desserts are amazing and service is very friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOp8P-RQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2022-7-15"},{"Name":"Paige C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTWZjT6ZGGGVMH_Qf1-zV5nG592HTIR5zPUxyi_hYfCD2hdAd5WA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little cafe with a wide variety of food and drink options! The prices are relatively low, but toppings are a little bit pricey. I got the strawberry calamansi and I really liked how the calamansi shined through. The boba was nice and soft and chewy, but was not sweetened. There are many places to sit and there are also snack options like ube flavored desserts and mochi churros. We didn't try but will definitely come back soon to try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ14m33QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x8959cf72981d4226"],"When":"2023-7-6"},{"Name":"Joel Pena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQu6yvzBu2JEsY-FOmGlM4I_zkMbh_1RX1YLqX7sdBEyE_jSmi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I ordered a cookie butter iced coffee. The flavor was good but the coffee was weak but overall still very delicious. I paid 7$ for the drink. I think that is too high for a coffee in my opinion but I don't regret my purchase.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Karm Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKl4ZmI_hq8knZEm14X44TPBVtxiBo2BLiEPuFWby3p2-F3Tc5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this cafe... Wish we had one in Encinitas. This is where I get my favorite matcha, with the cold coconut foam.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBBeDoKQlmk0tF0564KjNa&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Asim Billoo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrie15qmRYuZAykoqI2deYur7WLug2gEEofX3I0eq9k9y6Wvgi3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Mango Mirage was absolutely delicious! I had to go back and ask how it was made—turns out they use real mango, purée it, and layer it on top of the cold foam. Alicia was incredibly hospitable and such a pleasure to talk to.

The pesto and egg sandwich was just Soso, but it’s premade I assume through a vendor so I would not mark points off from cargo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKXc-Oezgtmd4wE&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Huy Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJyxm9lnuAwhWXtcKNJpEU-ZKY8Je28F9BS6WDH4GnYaYkSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The iced white mocha is really good—smooth, creamy, and just the right amount of sweet. It’s refreshing, satisfying, and an easy go-to when you want something that feels like a treat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGzDxJ3HVz103rpRhsl2X7&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Shan Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj4hBg_Pt9Eyx4XR_DRKBDQ_K9GO6FqgfZozWt2HXqudT1LYjD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this outdoor cafe space! Several specialty and old school choices for getting you caffeinated! The menu is vast. Acai bowls, desserts and baked goods too. I'm told the coffee beans are made in San Diego!

Espresso, cold brew, latte and more! Smoothies with fresh fruits and granola,  baked goods like muffins and lemon poppyseed bread.

A great space to chill with your choices or get right back on the road.

Plenty of free parking in the cul-de-sac parking lot. An easy, quick stop. You might think it's not there, but it is!

Seating outside. Comfortable, clean and peaceful setting in an industrial park setting.

I was here visiting in LaJolla and looked for a cafe on Waze and found this place. I hope you do too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVv7-YmAE&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2023-12-19"},{"Name":"Sage","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFhjrr-NU49K4Dcy8KmwgBwsWvXp_zAouELBSC2K8iXUtgVO-9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am addicted to their dirty chai with almond milk!! They have a 20¢ discounted if you bring your own cup! Such a cute cafe tucked away in a business park, baristas are so friendly. Best part of my work day for sure 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7yMCL3gE&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2024-8-20"},{"Name":"Nora Houchin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGugVa6pmSgEis-tO82-CdlQei22nOTU5b97FmWOgHeseSD2-R=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the PB Solo, one of the craziest tasting coffees I’ve maybe ever had and it is delicious. I love peanut butter and never would’ve thought someone could mix it properly into a coffee drink. 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDomNu_Ng&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"E L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_v59onYFORQKVM34eQaTE9i5PsxWRRXsVftWDco171y3myA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a cool, hidden spot. Parking isn’t ideal since it’s in a tech / business park. There’s a giant orange sail providing a ton of shade which is always a plus. The drink and food menu has enough for every palate and the three ladies behind the counter will crank it out for you. I ordered a “Something Sweet” with hazelnut and oat milk - it’s just a latte - that was very good. I’ll try food next time. Also, you have to time it right to arrive and order between the rush of business park employees.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDuy_WZ9wE&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2022-8-29"},{"Name":"Renata Ottoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_Yvs5MaRBAbrCsnyqaZE3RC_4PUlXSqxL8iYxMPz_XQ9xAlvT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cargo Cafe is located close to my work, but even if it wasn't, it is worth the stop! Very friendly staff and really good coffee. They also have some sandwich options, acai bowls and pastry! I definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc9ouVEw&fid=0x0:0x6a6eb03237c07355"],"When":"2020-1-24"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Olivia Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITkFzAp8CHd61-U492v-gixRyORzRXZQtCKHahsQWbREmOng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic northern Chinese food! Loved it and I'll definitely go there again if I'm ever back in San Diego! The staff was super friendly and large portion of food for the price. I saw a horrible rating saying the food is bad compared to China Town and I what kind of restaurants they went to. I guess they either went to the non authentic ones or the ones doing other styles of Chinese food. To me the Sichuan dishes and there northern dishes I got were pretty authentic. Enjoyed the taste from home overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICku62tKQ&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2018-10-4"},{"Name":"Sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXrRCC4MT-gxGQYR5tAVxjE4p8PNoj1KdOSWedo5x6llbYwerS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here after a long day of work. I ordered the wontons in spicy chili sauce and beef fried rice.  Now I rather enjoyed the spicy wontons and I also liked the lettuce garnish they added to it. Most spicy wontons I’ve had never had that but I like it.  It’s nice to have a crunch for added texture.  Also I added the sauce from the wontons to the fried rice because it was a bit dry. Made it 3x better.  The beef fried rice is quite good and I enjoyed this place. Now the spicy wontons weren’t that spicy so I asked for my chili oil on the side.  It was way better in my opinion but my spicy tolerance is way higher than most so don’t overdue it folks.  Play it safe and work your way up to the heat.

The staff were pretty friendly and I can’t wait to come back and try more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDemrvqMA&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2022-10-8"},{"Name":"teadrinker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHBcMgxhzIq3yF8pzb9oNTTNU1WgyTxXl0MfU-vH-snKSN6t0Lww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Searched for Ma-dasao but come to a link called Mr Holy Gao.  The restaurant owner must not want reviews.

The rating is more like 2.5

Came here because it is close to work.   Owner changed and food went south.   My friend’s Hainanese chicken rice was too yellow.  Was it dyed.   Garlic shrimp was too salty.  The chef must have a heavy hand on salt.   Noodle bowl was ok.

When we pay the bill,  the waitress won’t let go of the handle electronic device.  It was so awkward and inconvenient to input tips and personal information for the receipt.   Let go!  I won’t take the device home.

Probably won’t come here too often.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClzrnJoAE&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2023-11-18"},{"Name":"Rebecca Choi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFUi18SAr-25VwQu8swi59VTAyb0GEeTTLdztpq_HJl5HzqLyoYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We were there for lunch today and quite surprised at the portions of each dish for $7.99 lunch deals.  Literally, you can have three people share two orders if not one.  Busy during lunch hour so there's a bit of wait time.  After we ordered, the food did come fairly quickly.  The shrimps are huge, fresh.  Most dishes taste like home cook meals rather than restaurant food. They do not skimp on the ingredients.  This is the freshest value meals I've tasted in a very long time.  Must try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEuqDYpgE&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2018-9-27"},{"Name":"Joshua Norris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWurySG7QHR8mniHO0ovOjWOYUaL-PKv--EWwFFfLokxVPiMlJb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owner and staff are fun and friendly. The menu here offers many hard to find and unique dishes. If you like spicy food, there are a lot of options for you here, too.
The food here is well prepared and very flavorful. This is not a greasy Chinese fast food restaurant. This is a sit-down restaurant that offers great dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkuv7F5gE&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2019-6-7"},{"Name":"Alisa Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6LbPJOz18F3K5L-QPX-_sUz7CyHe9q13zf3ELUQat4cXmVV1L=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Horrible customer service

I saw this place on the San Diego Eater list of essential Chinese eateries. I ordered the pork shank among several other items and instead received “pork belly with preserved Napa in brown sauce”.  NOT THE SAME. It was the restaurants error and when I picked it up they said I had to wait 30-40 minutes for pork shank if I wanted it. I couldn’t wait and asked if they could take care of the incorrect item which the rude lady refused. So I paid for pork belly since it was for a work lunch and had to go. The pork belly sucked. I don’t like to eat that much pig fat which was 50% of the meal.

String beans were good, as were the egg rolls, Kung pao chicken and noodle soup that my colleagues ordered. I will never go to this place again as a service professional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChypm6TQ&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2023-2-10"},{"Name":"Rosanna Thai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6QqMeQaqkm99JR3R3i-LHUgct5hDTlr_evhI0TJdM8Jj6AQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall: The food was good, very authentic, and it took 20 minutes for the food to come out.

Fish with sour soup: The flavor is strong! But it was the perfect mixture of spicy and sour. I would highly recommend it pouring over and eating over the rice.
Spicy Noodle Soup: Again, more spicy than sour. However, it was the perfect Mala spicy-ness

Location:  Its in a plaza lose to the Qualcomm work place with a lot of the other places to eat. The parking might be limited if it is a busy day.

Service: Food came out fast. You know its authentic when you see a lot of Asian people eating there too. The ambiance was nice too,  clean and minimally decorated.

Price: It's a little pricy for my taste. However, the quality is good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh5LGoQQ&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2023-3-2"},{"Name":"Tu Cai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJe4MdyJbrcyBCLFKmhONza-Mc9BQwjKlPzePPMeewoC9lJjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very delicious, very good service. We're here on holiday from Boston. The price of this restaurant is much cheaper than that of our restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICeko73jwE&fid=0x0:0xccd177062b7b4c75"],"When":"2022-9-10"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Yousif Luois","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfGp6ur4qrXEPvUd2Iu5QJtGTpgFIl1RJNRRqFa_N2YPT9dB8-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I visited today for the first time during lunch and was disappointed in the service and food. For the service aspect of things I ordered 2 cali burritos and 2 fish tacos I was charged for 3 cali burritos. I didn't notice until the lady that took my order mentioned she would credit me. Then proceeded to give me the run-around about how it's easier to compensate you with the food than refund you. Ok? In the end I ended up with 3 burritos that were mediocre. No flavor at all. Salsa is plain with no taste. Me and My spouse were completely unsatisfied with the food quality and service for $60. I don't recommend this place at all and will never return. Double charged me, didn't offer a refund, and just overall bad service and food quality. The 3rd burrito was donated to a homeless person. That's how bad the food is.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emily Hao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5L20HoGgP6xt175yG7TBPoUIgrmonzKcUa_UYxUazeHrPpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Slight above average food in terms of freshness and quality but nothing to rave about. Other wise i would give 5 stars","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICup9XIaw\u0026fid=0x0:0xffa9a6ee4360bcd"],"When":"2022-8-8"},{"Name":"Deniz Turkmen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQixi_6IdlUaoxlkIHqShT7T7l_-v3wSycZg7SvMRXl7baA-BuzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I used to stop by here for breakfast burritos. Salsa bar is for dine-in customers only, so I was given some refrigerated options. Mild dark salsa tastes pretty good. The place looks clean. There is a TV for those who rather not look at their phones. It's in a shopping plaza which means plenty of parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk3d2bwQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xffa9a6ee4360bcd"],"When":"2019-3-1"},{"Name":"Fena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWcAXUYsI8moiitL89jHGFbU59l4FpdeE2K2xq-_10CKYmCwOo0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food, our GO TO Mexican restaurant which is more like a cafe for quick bite. That's why gave 4 star. Love the variety of salsa, green is my favourite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDO8pK7fg\u0026fid=0x0:0xffa9a6ee4360bcd"],"When":"2022-7-2"},{"Name":"Caitlyn Will","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZ222SnPf3TI0v5K9RBBaWkFqsIaUw-oP-xJzh-AHAN3pRnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I just ordered from them today and found plastic in my son’s burrito. I’m lucky that I found it rather than him eating it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzfJMR2yySOT9OvoVkSFIF\u0026fid=0x0:0xffa9a6ee4360bcd"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Pamela Algea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhpw4CVwtUvAbZvphPhRtZ3i7YOTGoY3nPaBOOGs4wMD5TbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have lived in Mira Mesa for more than 30 years and have loved Habanero's from the first time we tried their rolled tacos topped with salsa and freshly-made guacamole made it a \"go -to\" pick for its friendly, casual vibe and relaxed dining.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Nylander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpwa7Ts0da7DGaV3wsM2J3dvcgug6N-RFaJVV_gnzf92rEkcM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love their CA burrito....ask for.fries crispy inside, extra well done carne, and then drenched in their epic red enchilada sauce! Best Mex place in Mira Mesa, easy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk9Z3wHw\u0026fid=0x0:0xffa9a6ee4360bcd"],"When":"2018-9-30"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Eric Broockman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs8ORhKHeGX_WjEh519DaCiP8-B4M7e37EZ_VmWAa3ufRA9XH-3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere is one of old world golf club lounge - not surprising. A bit staid - but the outdoor deck looks awesome !  My scallops were wonderful. Wine choice was great. Enjoyed a pear salad. The little gluten free cornbread inspired starter surprise was delicious.  We will return. Finally - the service was friendly, knowledgeable, and appropriately attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUoP_PANgvm5q3aP4lBgLy\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7zDBr9iPDn5TbmqRrlEcTA-Kfvy574I4CUk7NYDxqgeovGKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing! The food was absolutely incredible (especially the scallops). Our server was also so sweet. I didn’t catch her name, but she was a young black woman. She deserves a raise! My boyfriend and her worked together to give me an amazing proposal and I could not be more grateful. The rest of the staff was so helpful as well. I dropped my napkin on the floor and a staff member saw from inside and came all the way outside to bring me a new one. Will definitely be returning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPhh3Sfg7Cls_StkFDFKVb\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Tom Cuccurullo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUNecVNuxMwR0lgiWMr9Enj41-dB0qL7ZF6e739qe2ovs-2UAo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My girlfriend and I came for a staycation and was introduced to this place by the concierge. Our experience was fantastic and that's what it was an experience! The staff was so attentive and kind, as well as knowledgeable. The cuisine was absolutely delightful, i enjoyed a beautifully cooked rib eye, they also make the most amazing biscuits to die for... Thank you for a lovely evening of fine dining.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwQteFGfSnzLsip5PBx4U1\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Brandon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl0OwGZuqqt2bmTSY_6cxhxzAoonRgCkXm-s-GTc7md9ZRlJ25=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and service was on par with a Michelin star restaurant. Each dish was balanced yet bold.  Many ingredients were locally sourced. The service was exceptional with every staff member having an inviting demeanor. Not only was the staff kind they were also very knowledgeable. Our waiter, Ryan, did an amazing job making our group feel like we were the most important people in the building.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXCvxqkkZfOt7eXvUNrk32\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Marc Toglia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4Xsu7r6h9L5xQlEiQPmhFfDvYL5KyaQhLiYJGCETNa5CJYh0XDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Always love dining when we come out west to visit family. Great atmosphere and service. Food is delicious. However, on our most recent trip last night, 3 of us had the duck, which consisted of only two slices of meat each plate. I don’t recall receiving such small portions in the past.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DC in D.C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXMlLgqncpNrfYO3nxRWGttuEFvDVk_hwCNai_irFbCV6grB0H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and service really really impressed us. We were the last table sat for lunch so we had the entire restaurant to ourselves. A bit awkward as it was very very quiet but the staff were extremely attentive, friendly, and did not rush us at all. We enjoyed the drinks, salads and entrees we ordered a lot. The serving sizes were large and flavorful, making the price worth it.\n\nWe came for the view, and on a cloudy day, it wasn’t quite the coastal feel that other reviewers might have given you. Instead, with a view of the pool, the golf course, and ocean in the deep background, you get the vibe that you’re at a fancy cabin retreat. And that’s also fun but a bit more serious than coastal. Note that for lunch there are no tablecloths but for dinner they dress every table up with white linens. In case that vibe affects your choice of outfit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT6_-b7wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2024-5-28"},{"Name":"Jaye Jo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgB9FUADTfrVeRtqQw55cJAgbLBe_6AimnWBkZOdFOpHeDKzplaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great food, great service with a wonderful few. We would dine here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUTvr0h5kp-e5iSldxrjJI\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"weiping chu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9pBMW1NEn091vB5AlhujTsuzxrNEtNK57M2ec8EdjiFBy3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The menu was creative, the food was delicious, and the service was professional.  What else can I ask for more.  If you lucky enough sitting in the outdoor patio, the sunset view in the afternoon, or the golf course view in the daytime are both stunning!!  I enjoyed the live music as well.  Acoustic music was played in just the right volume.   Love this place and enjoy the food very much.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICFm-n8Kw\u0026fid=0x0:0x762906b5dd252ca1"],"When":"2023-11-2"}]

[{"Name":"Savannah Macias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCy495L4KcH0gVasGlxpWYNs0Goj2Aa2oQEv9JBMWuIo7_UeS4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This was my first time eating here as a vegan and it is very close to my job so thought I’d try. I asked the lady assisting me what the vegan options were and decided on a crunch bowl with veggie as their falafel unfortunately is not vegan. It reminds me of el pollo locos taco salad it comes in a hard shell and has herb rice, lettuce, hummus, cucumber salad, and the vegetable skewer. For this and a drink it was $20 which imo is a little pricy. The food is just ok and I don’t think it is worth the price. I also don’t like how on the vegetable skewer it has what seems like Roma tomatos. It is a decent portion but the seasoning on the rice is a bit much. I only enjoyed the cucumber salad mainly. Service was good, I liked how the cashier was honest on her recommendations but there is no seating inside besides one table, Im assuming we are supposed to sit outside. Id rather go to LunaGrill a mile away, costs less and falafel is vegan and therefore more filling.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICptdWDjgE&fid=0x0:0x1cf705c53af213cc"],"When":"2023-8-7"},{"Name":"Sophia Lynch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUieSq4bZrWi3XysnqWPNXNYD3pTHWnf_fDebG1BhjK797=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been a customer for 6 years and it’s still amazing today as it was my first visit. The food quality is great and the customer service is why I keep coming back. The woman that runs management is so sweet! The kind of place they remember your face and order every time. The soup is also very delicious and would recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2mYxs&fid=0x0:0x1cf705c53af213cc"],"When":"2022-5-18"},{"Name":"Yoshie Obara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZpkuZW4qz5njW9_sqamorMCrMiFr184Qt6mh_vSLPCCaMgTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding customer service and clean delicious food and I was there 15years ago
Taste still same was suprised.
Thank you for making good food 😋","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rachael Burke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0c0VNumoG7hEOyDIdF-cRyTAjjcqs8l8L1_blFxBIEi-NAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food is great.  My favorite is the lamb which like all of their dishes they cooked it to order over the mesquite fire pit.  Always worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk2Y2PXQ&fid=0x0:0x1cf705c53af213cc"],"When":"2018-5-17"},{"Name":"Sandie K.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQ4FEKZsSovvnGZ_kUrwpTkPw4Lx02MwhEXbbHCx08WSumbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been eating here for well over 10 years on a weekly (if not sometimes daily) basis.  The chicken wrap is to die for.  My husband always gets the chicken kabob plate.  Of course you have to always get the yummy hummus and pita bread.  I drive 10 miles from my home to eat here, driving past Luna Grill (yuk) and other like restaurants.  The food at Marketplace Grille has better flavor, quality ingredients, and the staff is always welcoming and friendly.  Picture of the last half of my chicken wrap before I finish it off!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID0m_ubMw&fid=0x0:0x1cf705c53af213cc"],"When":"2019-10-25"},{"Name":"Patryk Kleba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE_m8VgL140rPTXl7S2N63f-aRZdMs0JW1eEuEPFopmfsVYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went to this place for a quick bite to eat but was pleasantly surprised at how friendly the staff was.

The combo with chicken and beef was light and very flavorful. I would reccomend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roberto Padilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6ZuLzOx4ddNds_138qrX-3oWB75Y93tKfTtAX5rOTksnuSkOe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time trying here and it was amazing customer service and food definitely coming back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rafay Malik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzDQQGchFbg_vy_Y51hbtvuKbqk-GMU2mntFFqAM3Unu3xvSYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Such a weird experience.

Let me start with the way the employee at the cashier somehow thought he could take two customer orders at a time. Leaving me hanging during my order, which I believe is very disrespectful.
Second, the portion size of the food they give is a complete joke. For the prices they charge, I dont think they realise how small their portions are. I mean really, I was surprised and annoyed at the same time.
I dont think I'm ever coming back at this place again, not when I have numerous other option literally within a half mile radius.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk4bm56AE&fid=0x0:0x1cf705c53af213cc"],"When":"2019-1-21"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gustavo Pena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHd7XsJtBw1Y12_oRPAyoUkSSK8fOnih_o69EsPxwTuCYqKEE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am still savoring the magic of my NYE dinner at Fleurette. The service was impeccable, with attentive and knowledgeable staff who made us feel like esteemed guests. Every detail was meticulously handled, from the amuse-bouche to the final dessert course.

The wine pairings were a true highlight, expertly crafted to elevate each dish. The sommelier's recommendations added depth and complexity to the already stunning food.

The food was nothing short of extraordinary, with each dish showcasing the chef's creativity and skill. The Gnocchi course with white truffles was a standout a sublime marriage of flavors and textures that left us wanting more. The presentation was equally impressive, with each plate a work of art.

Fleurette delivered an unforgettable dining experience, making it the perfect way to ring in the New Year. The atmosphere was elegant and sophisticated, with a warm and inviting ambiance that made us feel right at home.

If you're looking for a truly exceptional  dinner in San Diego, look no further than Fleurette. Bravo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_teglgnfhitBeImwb2Hp9&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Softwave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIlQtTs_skDyOf-cFiVGqWvl-zA0nmt7cGBteodJHRRepfmMUZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the very first cocktails, James immediately had our trust. We asked him to guide us through the evening, and every recommendation was spot on. His attention and awareness set the tone for the entire experience.

Chef Travis’s talent was showcased in every single bite. Every course was bright, light, rich, decadent, savory, thoughtful, precise, and full of flavor. The lobster and bouillabaisse were exceptional, and the black truffle hazelnut gnocchi is easily the best thing I’ve ever eaten. Our citrus dessert was ohhh too good!
Also valet was very accommodating, thank you Tyler.

If you haven’t made a reservation yet, I can’t recommend it enough. Thank you to everyone who made this Sunday night one of the best dining experiences I’ve had in a very long time, the entire evening was incredible and I can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZk1jo8is4EbtFunDIq4CY&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Adriana Tzalel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjuJf84hoqytSocE0a4e2evDZsrwHZaOn4Qa6058Uw89zEpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I’ll start by saying that the service was incredible, as was the ambience. However, we were really disappointed in the food. Our hopes were high as each dish was set on our table — we were wow’d by the stunning presentation each time. Unfortunately, we found each dish to lack flavor (some more than others).

The leeks was our favorite savory dish that we ordered, but it still left us wanting a bit more in terms of flavor. The caviar added some much needed saltiness. The kanpachi was stunning, and the fish was very fresh, but it didn’t pack much flavor. The Oeufs was the dish we were most looking forward to, and it unfortunately let us down the most. Very little truffle flavor, if at all. The uni was good, but it got lost in everything else.

The special of the night was a gnocchi with a hazelnut pesto, covered in a gruyere sauce with shaved truffle. Sounds incredible, right? We thought so too, which is why we ordered it. Once again, we found it had little flavor, which seems impossible! The best part of the dish was the soft, pillowy texture of the gnocchi. We had our hopes set high with the egg yolk fettuccine, which smelled incredible. Unfortunately, once again, we were left wanting more in terms of flavor.

We ordered the Mille-Feuille for dessert, which was personally my favorite dish of the night. The textures were fun and the hazelnut flavor went perfectly with the rich chocolate. Delicious!

Overall, very impressed with the presentation of each dish and the service (extremely attentive and knowledgeable), but disappointed in the food itself (especially at such a high price point).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgHtjnwx7iSAt4zhq8Jyzn&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Hal Jurgensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMeWjn7kJrkhuuuHiK8AIs-KWnMLy3iiAtjVOXDD0orYLywXxpYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fleurette is an absolute gem. Chef-Owner Travis Swikard delivers exceptional French Mediterranean cuisine that’s as refined as it is inviting. Every dish bursts with creativity, balance, and care. The service is equally outstanding — professional, attentive, and genuinely warm. From the elegant atmosphere to the flawless execution, Fleurette sets a new standard for dining excellence. Oeuf's and Eggs may be the most viral dish in the next coming months,  the presentation and taste is out of this world - you have to get it. Cocktails were also great, we got the "Del Mar" solely because that's where we're from and it tasted like cucumbers on your eyelids at a health and wellness spa drink - so refreshing. Harris Ranch Beef was our main, the NY strip was perfectly cooked and the beef cheek may be the softest meat I've ever had in my life. I had extremely high expectations with Fleurette and I'm so glad you completely blew us away last night. Can't wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAl7bx-sL2mQAbj1fkyJlm_&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Sama Skye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWad2MzhGaFA9KNDv0Ql5giEcIAGuCR0tBtewCT8HuyMH-mJEY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I will update this review if I see a change upon my next visit.

The good:
Ambiance, service, theme and decor, presentation, food creativity, cocktails were great! My favorite dish was the bolognese pasta and the Oeufs and Eggs, both were delightful!

The bad:
We had 2 cocktails, 5 dishes (some were apps and a side) and it was $250. Seems a little overpriced to me.

2/5 dishes we had were way too salty
I did politely bring it to chef’s attention when he was making his rounds. It seems I’m also not the first person to complain about this. For a girl that likes salt, this was actually so bad that I had to chug water to offset the saltiness because we were too embarrassed to send it back. Dishes that were salty were Steak Tartare and the Chicken entree.

Hoping these are just growing pains, and that they adjust accordingly. Might help to see which chef has a heavy hand back there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-opQeZMb9OTkr0NFsrWht&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Ray Ehscheid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6x9jdLVRCrBUzrrIn0QUrfbtDtW50OA7tFgBIymgE2UCGrWOF7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Flew in from New York for an unforgettable evening and it delivered on every level. Every dish was absolutely delicious, beautifully presented, and thoughtfully balanced from start to finish. Highlights included a playful take on a dirty martini, crisp barbajuans, winter pumpkin and chestnut doppio agnolotti, and a standout bacon-wrapped California sturgeon. The precision, flavor clarity, and restraint across the menu were exceptional. Even on a cool evening, a brief walk through the garden hinted at what will be a special outdoor experience come spring. Thrilled for the chef and excited to watch his continued growth and impact on the San Diego dining scene.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGt7CxAzWy3fUf-cS1b9AV&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Justin Schwartz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhsv0A44FzFPN5iGrc9NlIWiaMJBEjNmpowvhyrTbr7YVSSbalBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible. It feels special to be this early to the opening to a restaurant like Fleurette. My wife and I love its sister restaurant, Callie, and we’ve been waiting for Fleurette to open for quite some time.

Service
A few kinks to be worked out, but this restaurant has been open for 6 days, so some grace is needed. Overall, very knowledgeable staff armed with recommendations, professionalism, and kindness. They’re very attentive with water refills and changing out plates and silverware. They weren’t able to recognize my birthday because they opened so recently and didn’t have cards ready, but that’s not a big deal.

Drinks
We had the Del Mar and the Provence. Both were light, refreshing, and unique.

Food
Overall, very impressive. It’s a nice spin on French food that doesn’t feel as inaccessible as purely French restaurants because of the Mediterranean element. The absolute standout menu item is the Oeufs & Eggs. We were blown away. None of the other menu items were regrets, but they also weren’t nearly as show-stopping as the Oeufs & Eggs, which is both beautifully presented and delicious. See my photos for what else we got, but in short, other great items were the Garganelli alla Genovese, the pissaladière, and the roast golden chicken. The chicken does have a bit of a rosemary flavor, but I happen to love rosemary. The sauce and the crispy skin are amazing.

Fleurette vs Callie
It’s inevitable to compare sister restaurants. I do enjoy Mediterranean food more than French food, so overall Callie is the winner, but even at its early stages, Fleurette holds its own. The astounding Aleppo Chicken at Callie is hard to beat, but you could say the same about the Oeufs & Eggs at Fleurette. Ultimately, they’re different, and they’re both worth it.

Recommended?
Yes. I will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOApbKs2oAdHc7lEtQB6ah&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Ashley Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMhq1_U5gzX5p_C6by-I7armWFnX8X2T0DeBp2Dfr0mfz2Bo1R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Atmosphere was lovely. Waitstaff were all wonderful!

However, the food is on the saltier side and unfortunately, the main dish of Tagliolini was far too salty and it was increasingly difficult to ingest with each bite. Vacherin dessert was light and refreshing.

Be aware for the 4% automatic surcharge to the bill.

Will come back again to give it another try in a year","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmRqxs2p6VcF4Tcftegmdh&fid=0x0:0xc45a4a41036e9b4f"],"When":"2025-12-29"}]

[{"Name":"Dana Pasculescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYgreLhEudpKpNqmL0Yn6m8lXUVUOlacOU6tVgoN9K2He7qZM-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rayluca Chocolate has completely changed my expectations of what clean, health-conscious chocolate can taste like. Living in San Diego, I’m surrounded by wellness-focused brands, but this one truly stands out. Made with premium Belgian chocolate and sweetened with real maple syrup, Rayluca delivers a rich, smooth flavor without relying on artificial ingredients.

The quality is immediately noticeable, from the silky texture to the depth of flavor. It feels indulgent while still aligning with a clean, intentional lifestyle. This is chocolate you can enjoy mindfully, whether as an everyday treat or a special moment of indulgence.

If you’re searching for Belgian chocolate, naturally sweetened chocolate, clean ingredient chocolate, or a health-conscious chocolate brand in California and beyond, Rayluca is an easy recommendation. Thoughtfully made, beautifully balanced, and genuinely delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBN79gEVei5Bog3Z9aJ7v_x&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Mike Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVA5nclwUkYCS-YIHcZbAlzt3l0yaadd_xchTeCclURMBkYIj3F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve been enjoying Rayluca chocolates for several years now with their amazing array of healthy, high quality, vegan chocolate in San Diego. We were thrilled that they opened a new storefront with chocolate tastings, and were lucky enough to be the first ones to partake in one of the sessions. It was a wonderful, personable experience with the founders. We got to see where “the magic happens” and try a very generous selection of chocolates that also included a blind tasting contest with the other participants. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBoaS8hoI0BRLI_UWHtAmDg&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Logan Blunt-Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1afCYBerO0g22YDVpYF85WTzl5sRYm7M2xWX9sV9fGuCx3ys=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For someone who cares deeply about ingredients and quality, I feel so excited to have found Rayluca chocolates. Real, gourmet chocolates without all of horrible ingredients. Family owned and operated, Vegan, Gluten free, Gourmet, quality ingredients, and No refined sugar !!! Impossible to find these days. I rest easy knowing how much thought and care is put into the sourcing and making of these beautiful chocolates. Owners are so friendly!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTo97Fn-7-MSazrUsiC8pM&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Ofri Avgil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZVsj8e0fxzqFLwTc-fzcaL_qW8Yh7wrVqixNcYfMfSxzyhaJc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"so incredibly delicious and has such a luxurious feel! The filling is so rich in flavor, yet not overpowering. And the chocolate itself isn’t too sweet, which I highly enjoy! I also tried their hot chocolate mix which was so yum and rich! and what I loved the most is that the products are all celiac friendly, gluten free, dairy free. perfect for gifting in the upcoming holidays!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6E6qt8wOv1lxDL_Y3wVOo&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Courtney Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOdtHDVXuwSAhWBuCADfkmTFSZpyF-rVPmxZTKU-OLRiRbSTV-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been purchasing from Rayluca for years because it’s one of the highest quality gluten-free and dairy-free chocolate products I’ve found (friends and family members who’ve tried it didn’t know it was gluten-free or dairy-free and absolutely loved it as well). The flavor combinations are so creative! A few of my favorite flavors are: S’mores, Hazelnut Ganache, and Salted Caramel. The ingredients are high quality and don’t contain processed, refined sugar. Highly recommend if you’re in San Diego- or ship it to another location (I’ve gifted to family members states away and the packaging and presentation is always fantastic).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBiUXvpCDUHZFfuyrmz_Y8&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"B M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKccZtlhq9wnh2ZCD4BFNF1CJpIx3oH679H93eel0IEnOHqLF5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re in San Diego and looking for gluten-free gourmet chocolate that’s truly refined, lower glycemic, and refined sugar-free, Raylua Chocolate is exceptional. The chocolate is thoughtfully balanced — not too sweet, clean on the palate, and made so you can actually taste the quality of the ingredients.

This is clearly craft chocolate made with care. Everything feels intentional, from the flavors to the presentation. It’s indulgent without being heavy or overwhelming, which is rare in chocolate.

Finding something that’s refined sugar-free, lower glycemic, and still genuinely luxurious isn’t easy — but Raylua absolutely delivers. You can tell this is a company that truly cares about what they make, and it shows in every detail.

Highly recommend for anyone who values quality, balance, and beautifully made chocolate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDEaZB4PB_AKTvILVK_fL6&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Sabrina Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVs7nDWxSr9ZJqeXfzZWmVsp1K2B4tM7IbHGnW_5tAYRj8rAnfI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bryan was amazing! Best hot chocolate and chocolates you’ll ever have! And I have a dairy and gluten allergy and could have everything! This is a MUST for every chocolate lover! I care about what I eat and its plant-based and clean ingredients which is amazing! Definitely coming back, even again in the rain! Love that they’re here in the Little Italy Farmers Market!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCX29KPdHyUKDr9GZ7OgRsv&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"reba Daniels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvgn_crutTHldnhkvHUnpFZ7mLmRxceeFT6sT07uTl6FAUSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried Rayluca Chocolate at a local market, and it was absolutely delicious! Highly recommend if you want chocolate that’s both wholesome and indulgent!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV3E4iFs3TG2dngK32CGIR&fid=0x0:0x16786fb517c2777c"],"When":"2025-11-8"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Brian Kramer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDp2soxNUaGoOhZT5-WHYo5AVD3acdtfYQF28TNTOQkpWJI-GHQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I will be honest, I wasn't expecting much from this place and was extremely pleasantly surprised. I got the breakfast burrito and wife got a chicken sandwich. My burrito had shredded potato which I have never had before, and was piping hot coming right off a stove. My wife loved the sourdough. They allowed customizations and were extremely friendly, offering to make us something else if we didn't like it. I could tell the gentleman was the owner (you can always tell with a small business due to niceness and professionalism). Unbelievably things got better, as he gave us a huge chocolate chip cookie to go, which was also spectacular. A nice hidden gem we will be going back to when we are back in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCEdp6hdnQTlhUy4LlBYcLH&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Sarah S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7wRKX5UL4hl8lucWMbYGMQBhukpD-KgK5WLg0PrRTMGmwwD5W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first visit this morning and definitely not the last!

I literally had googled "best almond croissant near me" and this place was suggested.

Unfortunately they had sold out of almond croissants by the time I went (so very popular!) and tried this delicious sweet danish pastry (see photo).

The service was friendly/great!

I'll be back to try other items on the menu!

Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAx0BOx_Bj2oqfsoA4krav7&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Janey GoExplore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmCXY_JP7nz1SRh6GreYdgwl1ivomkCTekslQLbCc7i01e2Og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We liked the food here, sandwich tasted very fresh and great, they don’t serve coffee, but you can order coffee next door and sit outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9WpTRcCGklD5ZlpDIrxYV&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Wangjae Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqk4AR_RneLqBFx01jnmdWc7rb5e5FxizzEWCltQYslerB6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"At first, worker is very friendly.
Breads taste amazimg!
only cons is that Almond Croissant is sold out too early that is my wife's favorite!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtD2jOgzoneyZJ_PEsRAO5&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Jeremy Alfano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVNp1B1pL4YyP2AAeSW1kenbdsVTfN_jUIleyf6NQkTtb6PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolute must stop if you’re in the Torrey Pines area. Needed some refueling after a hike and this was am the spot. Every pastry we tried was delicious; perfectly baked and great flavor. Got a full baguette and devoured it.

Go here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCInLGbEw&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-3-31"},{"Name":"Lila Zubik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4Hq5XQkEbbj7vVbASHQiKkRvL5DkRg1Mx17LHYtue9i5sqpGb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LuckyBolt was recommended to me by a French person who now lives in San Diego. That was enough for me to drive to their strange location. I'm so glad I did, their pastries are amazing! I don't even the correct words too describe my favorite, but there are mushrooms and maybe garlic on a crispy, flakey pastry. Simply. Amazing. And the fresh bagettes are devine. Thank you for being you. Now open a location in Mission Valley, or someplace easier to get to :-)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Makenna Bean","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE6DHkQfjbhe489eZFY-xVOUEMulNt64Hk-E2eLCLShdFKT8s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just so happened to find a gem today—Luckybolt Kitchen and Bakery! From the moment we walked in, we were blown away by the incredible food, impeccable service, and warm atmosphere. Everything we tried was outstanding, from the perfectly balanced Caesar wrap to the flavorful, beautifully textured sourdough loaf.

We couldn’t resist trying one of every pastry, and each one has been divine so far. The selection is fantastic, offering something for everyone, with new items regularly rotating in to keep things exciting. Knowing that everything is farm-to-table and made with the freshest ingredients makes the experience even better.

Beyond the food, the service was exceptional—friendly, personable, and truly knowledgeable. The staff took the time to help us choose the best items based on our preferences, making us feel welcomed and valued.

Chris and his team have created something special, and we’ll absolutely be back often. It’s rare to find a place that checks every box, but Luckybolt has done just that!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgyvGNKA&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Stephan Freeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaMXvABaohYuAG8yPMdK0mrICI3pDt9HInvW-PjkiZYmWScamg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really delicious food. The bowl of goodness (pictured!) is what I usually get - it’s always served with quinoa, lentils, and kale, but I absolutely love the different seasonal veggies that it comes with each week.

The “tofu of destiny” is amazing. It’s just a little spicy but with tons of flavor, and I get it every time. I don’t know how they came up with this recipe, but I’ve never had tofu like it before.

Also, everything that is vegetarian/vegan is clearly marked! Although they do have plenty of meat options.

The sweets are great too. I really enjoy the chocolate banana bread.

I cannot overstate how much I love this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZvr70IQ&fid=0x0:0xe70068976fe0e48"],"When":"2023-10-1"}]
